U Sidi (imbagĂ„Â§ad jeqridkom u) igib gens ieĂ„Â§or flokkom, u intom (minkejja li-xxierku allat oĂ„Â§ra miegĂ„Â§u) Xejn ma. tistgĂ„Â§u tagĂ„Â§mlulu Ă„Â§sara. Sidi tabilĂ„Â§aqq iĂ„Â§ares lil kollox (u lil kulĂ„Â§add mill-Ă„Â§sara)

58.translation: U meta gie l-amar tagĂ„Â§na (u kien wasal il-kastig tar-riĂ„Â§ qawwi. li: qeridhom), Ă„Â§lisna. lil Had u lil dawk miegĂ„Â§u li emmnu, bi Ă„Â§niena mingĂ„Â§andna, u Ă„Â§lisniehom minn kastig iebes

59.translation: Dak (kien il-gens ta'j GĂ„Â§ad: huma caĂ„Â§du s-sinjali ta' Sidhom, m'obdewx lill-MibgĂ„Â§utin tiegĂ„Â§u, u mxew fuq l-amar ta' kull tirann ta' rasu iebsa)

60.translation: U f'din id-dinja (kellhom) saĂ„Â§ta. li mxiet warajhom, u (baqgĂ„Â§et magĂ„Â§hom saĂ„Â§ansitra sa) Jum il-Qawmien. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li GĂ„Â§ad caĂ„Â§du lil Sidhom. Mela Ă„Â§alli jkun GĂ„Â§ad, gens Had, 'il bogĂ„Â§od (minni, misĂ„Â§ut u meqrudji)

61.translation: U gĂ„Â§and (il-gens ta') Tamid (bgĂ„Â§arna) lil Ă„Â§uhom SAliĂ„Â§. Huwa qal: ''Ja niesi, qimu lil Alla; ma gĂ„Â§andkomx alla (ieĂ„Â§or) gĂ„Â§ajrul Huwa li Ă„Â§alaqkom mill-art, u qabbadkom biex tgĂ„Â§ammru fiha. Mela fissa) itolbuh maĂ„Â§fra u duru lejh (bl- indiema). TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Sidi huwa qrib u jwiegeb (il-Ă„Â§tigijiet tagĂ„Â§kom)

62.translation: (Huma qalu/lu): 'Ja-SaliĂ„Â§, qabel ma (seĂ„Â§Ă„Â§). dan, inti kont fostna (bĂ„Â§ala bniedem) li konna nittamaw fih (imma issa qtajna jiesna minnek). Jaqaw qiegĂ„Â§ed izommna milli nqimu dak li kienu jqimu missirijietna/ AĂ„Â§na tassew ninsabu f'dubju u bejn Ă„Â§alltejn dwar dak li qiegĂ„Â§ed issejĂ„Â§ilna gĂ„Â§alih

63.translation: Huwa qal(i/hom): ''Ja niesi, x'taĂ„Â§sbu 2 Jekk jiena gĂ„Â§andi xhieda cara minn Sidi, u tani Ă„Â§niena mingĂ„Â§andu (li hija l- profezija), min jaqbez gĂ„Â§alija quddiem Alla jekk ma nobdihx (u ma nxandarx dak li bagĂ„Â§atni bih) 2 U (jekk biex nagĂ„Â§gobkom, ma nagĂ„Â§milx dmiri magĂ„Â§kom) x'se tkunu zidtuni, gĂ„Â§ajr fit-telfien

64.translation: Janiesi, din hija l-gemla ta' Alla, sinjal gĂ„Â§alikom. Mela Ă„Â§alluha tiekol (u tixrob Ă„Â§ielsa) f'art Alla, u la tmissuha b'ebda Ă„Â§sara, inkella jeĂ„Â§odkom (gĂ„Â§al gĂ„Â§arrieda) kastig (li jinsab) til-qrib

65.translation: Izda huma qatluha u (Saa/iĂ„Â§) qal(ilhom): ''Gawdu f'darkom gĂ„Â§al tlett ijiem (oĂ„Â§ra biss, imbagĂ„Â§ad taraw il- kastig gej fuqkom.) Dik wegĂ„Â§da li ma titgiddibx

66.translation: U meta gie l-amar tagĂ„Â§na (bil-kastig), Ă„Â§lisna lil SaliĂ„Â§ u lil dawk miegĂ„Â§u li emmnu, bi Ă„Â§niena mingĂ„Â§andna, mill- gĂ„Â§ajb ta' dakinhar. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Sidek huwa l-Qawwi, il- FelĂ„Â§an

67.translation: U lil dawk li-gĂ„Â§amlu l-Ă„Â§azen Ă„Â§adhom (gĂ„Â§al gĂ„Â§arrieda) Ă„Â§oss qawwi (li Ă„Â§asadhom), u mas-sebĂ„Â§ kienu mixĂ„Â§utin. (fl-art, mejtin) fi djarhom

68.translation: bĂ„Â§allikieku (qatt) ma gĂ„Â§exu fihom. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li (nies) Tamiid caĂ„Â§du lil Sidhom. Mela Ă„Â§alli jkunu (nies) Tamiid zil bogĂ„Â§od (minn Alla, misĂ„Â§utin u meqrudin)l

69.translation: Il-MibgĂ„Â§utin tagĂ„Â§na gew gĂ„Â§and Abraham bil-bxara t- tajba, u qalu(/u): 'Sliemi' Qal(i/hom): ''Sliem/' u ma damx ma gabfilhom) gĂ„Â§ogol mixwi

70.translation: U meta ra li ma middux idejhom fuqu (l-ikel), gĂ„Â§ajnu gĂ„Â§okritu minnhom, u Ă„Â§ass biza' minĂ„Â§abba fihom. Huma qaluflu): 'La tibzax, (gĂ„Â§aliex aĂ„Â§na angli u. ma niklux ikelji AĂ„Â§na. mibgĂ„Â§utin gĂ„Â§and nies: Lot. (biex neqirduhom)

71.translation: U martu (Sara) kienet wieqfa (fil-qrib, wara purtiera) u daĂ„Â§ket. U tajnieha l-bxara dwar (it-twelid ta') Izakk, u wara Izakk (jitwieled) Gakobb

72.translation: Hija qalet (mistagĂ„Â§gba): ''JaĂ„Â§asra gĂ„Â§alijat Se nwelled meta jiena xjaĂ„Â§t, u dan zewgi huwa xiĂ„Â§ 7 Din tassew Ă„Â§aga ta' l-gĂ„Â§agebl

73.translation: (Qalufiha l-MibgĂ„Â§urin): 'QiegĂ„Â§da tistagĂ„Â§geb bl-amar ta' Alla (meta taf li-Huwa fuq kollox SergĂ„Â§an)' Il-Ă„Â§niena ta' Alla u l- barkiet tiegĂ„Â§u jkunu fuqkom, ja nies id-dar fta' Abraham). Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq jistĂ„Â§oqq kull tifĂ„Â§ir, u Kollu SebĂ„Â§i

74.translation: U meta l-biza' Ă„Â§alla lil Abraham (gĂ„Â§aliex fehem li dawk in-ries kienu tabilĂ„Â§aqq angli ta' Alla), u' (meta) gietu l-bxara t-tajba (dwar it-twelid ta' Iakk), huwa Ă„Â§aqqaqha magĂ„Â§na dwar nies Lot (gĂ„Â§aliex: ried (i lil-dawn jingĂ„Â§atalhom aktar zmien biex forsi jindmu u jitolbu maĂ„Â§fra)

75.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Abraham kien idum ma jagĂ„Â§dab, wisq Ă„Â§anin (mar- nies l-oĂ„Â§ra, jibza' gĂ„Â§alihom), u niedem

76.translation: (L-angli qalulu): Ja Abraham, Ă„Â§allik minn dan (u roqgĂ„Â§odx taqbez gĂ„Â§al nies Lot). TabilĂ„Â§aqq gĂ„Â§adu kif gie l-amar ta' Sidek, u fuqhom tassew gej kastig li ma. jinzammx lura (rrinnhom, u se. jinqerdu)

77.translation: U mela l-MibgĂ„Â§utin (l-angli) tagĂ„Â§na gew gĂ„Â§and Lot, huwa tnikket gĂ„Â§alihom (gĂ„Â§aliex Ă„Â§asibhom bnedmin bĂ„Â§all-oĂ„Â§rajn u beza' li niesu kienu se jabbuzaw minnhom) u Ă„Â§ass id-diqa minĂ„Â§abba fihom (gĂ„Â§aliex ma setax iĂ„Â§arishom mill-Ă„Â§azen ta' niesu), u qal: Dan jum tal-biza' f

78.translation: U niesu gew mgĂ„Â§agglin gĂ„Â§andu (gĂ„Â§aliex riedu jidinbu mal- barranin li kienu gĂ„Â§adhom kif waslu gĂ„Â§and Lot), u. qabel kienu (ilhom) jagĂ„Â§mlu gĂ„Â§emejjel Ă„Â§ziena. Qalilhom (Lor): 'Ja niesi, dawn il-bniet tiegĂ„Â§i (li jgĂ„Â§ixu miegĂ„Â§i f'din. il-belt) huma aktar satja. gĂ„Â§alikom. (u jixirgulkom aktar). Mela ibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla, u la twaqqgĂ„Â§unix fil-gĂ„Â§ajb (bi mgiba Ă„Â§azina) mal-mistednin tiegĂ„Â§i. Jaqaw fostkom ma hemmx ragel (wieĂ„Â§ed) bil-gĂ„Â§aqal

79.translation: Qalu: 'Inti taf li ma gĂ„Â§andniex jedd fuq il-bniet tiegĂ„Â§ek (gĂ„Â§aliex m'aĂ„Â§niex migbudin lejn in-nisa), u inti tassew taf dak li rridu, (irgiel bĂ„Â§alna)

80.translation: (Qalfilhom. Lor): 'Mhux. li kelli. l-qawwa. kontrikom, jew (gĂ„Â§allinqas) li nistkenn gĂ„Â§and (xi Ă„Â§add b'saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§tu li jkunti bĂ„Â§al) xi rokna qawwijaf

81.translation: U (il-MibgĂ„Â§utin) qalu: 'Ja Lot, aĂ„Â§na l-MibgĂ„Â§utin ta' Sidek. (Mela serraĂ„Â§ rasek gĂ„Â§aliex) ma humiex se jaslu sa gĂ„Â§andek (u ma humiex se jagĂ„Â§mlulek denijL Mela (issa) itlaq bil-familja tiegĂ„Â§ek, f'Ă„Â§in minn tal-lejl (li baqa'), u (ara li) Ă„Â§add minnkom ma jĂ„Â§ares lura, Ă„Â§lief martek, gĂ„Â§aliex se jmissha dak (il-kastig). li jmiss lilhom. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li l-Ă„Â§in imwiegĂ„Â§ed (gĂ„Â§a//-kastig) tagĂ„Â§hom huwa gĂ„Â§odwa jadiw-EgĂ„Â§adwa tie Ă„Â§ijiex fil-qibr

82.translation: U meta gie l-amar tagĂ„Â§na (u wasal il-kastig, il-bliet) gĂ„Â§amilniehom ta' taĂ„Â§t fuq, u nizzilna fuqhom xita ta' gebel ta' fuĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar iebes, saff fuq saff

83.translation: (kull waĂ„Â§da) imnaqqxa (u mibgĂ„Â§uta) minn Sidek, u (dan il-gebel) ma huwiex 'il bogĂ„Â§od mill-Ă„Â§ziena

84.translation: U gĂ„Â§and (il-gens ta') Madjan (bgĂ„Â§arna) lil Ă„Â§uhom XugĂ„Â§ajb. Huwa qal: 'Ja niesi; qimu lil Allat Ma gĂ„Â§andkomx alla (ieĂ„Â§or) gĂ„Â§ajru, La tnaqqsux fil-kejl u l- uzin (kif tĂ„Â§obbu tagĂ„Â§mlu). Jiena tabilĂ„Â§aqq narakom li ma jonqoskom xejn, izda tassew nibza' li (jekk m'intomx se tibdlu Ă„Â§ajjitkom) se jkollkom il-kastig ta' Jum li jdawwarkom minn kullimkien (hekk li Ă„Â§add ma jaĂ„Â§rab minnu)

85.translation: Janiesi, agĂ„Â§tu kejl u wzin sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§, bil-Ă„Â§aqq, u la ccaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§dux lin-nies dak li hu tagĂ„Â§hom' La tagĂ„Â§mlux Ă„Â§azen fuq l-art bil-Ă„Â§sara tagĂ„Â§koml

86.translation: Dak. (il-gid xieraq) di Alla Ă„Â§allielkom huwa aĂ„Â§jar gĂ„Â§alikom (minn dak li tiksbu bil-qerq), jekk. intom temmnu. Jiena m'iniex gĂ„Â§assies fuqkom (u dmiri, bĂ„Â§ala MibgĂ„Â§ut ta' Alla, huwa biss li niftĂ„Â§ilkom gĂ„Â§ajnejkom biex taraw is-sewwa u l-Ă„Â§aqq)U

87.translation: (Qalfulu bi tkasbir): 'Ja XugĂ„Â§ajb, jaqaw it-talb tiegĂ„Â§ek qiegĂ„Â§ed jamarlek biex inĂ„Â§allu dak li kienu jqimu missirijietna, jew li (ma nibqgĂ„Â§ux) nagĂ„Â§mlu li rridu b'gidna 7. Inti tabilĂ„Â§aqq dak li jdum. ma jagĂ„Â§dab, u bil- gĂ„Â§aqal

88.translation: Qal(ilhom): 'Ja niesi, x'taĂ„Â§sbu 7 Jekk gĂ„Â§andi xhieda cara minn Sidi (bis-saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§a tal-profezija), u tani gĂ„Â§ajxien tajjeb mingĂ„Â§andu, (jaqaw ma huwiex (dmiri li nĂ„Â§eggigkom titilqu l-allat foloz tagĂ„Â§kom) 2 Jiena ma rridx li nagĂ„Â§mel minn wara daharkom dak. li qiegĂ„Â§ed inzommkom lura minnu. Jiena rrid biss li, kemm nista', (ingib). it-titjib (fil-qagĂ„Â§da tagĂ„Â§kom, biex timxu 'l quddiem). U s-success. tiegĂ„Â§i (f'dan) huwa biss b'Alla. F'idejh Ă„Â§allejt, u lejh indur bl-indiema

89.translation: Ja niesi, la tĂ„Â§allux il-mibegĂ„Â§da tagĂ„Â§kom: kontrija twassalkom li jmisskom dak (il-kastig) li mess-lil-nies Noc, jew nies Hid, jew nies SaliĂ„Â§. U (kunu afis 1i) nies Lot ma humiex 'il bogĂ„Â§od minnkom (u gĂ„Â§alhekk tistgĂ„Â§u taraw xi gralhom u tieĂ„Â§du tagĂ„Â§lima)

90.translation: Itolbu l-maĂ„Â§fra mingĂ„Â§and Sidkom, imbagĂ„Â§ad. duru riedmin lejh' Sidi tabilĂ„Â§aqq Ă„Â¦anin u Kollu MĂ„Â§abba

91.translation: Qalufhij: 'Ja XugĂ„Â§ajb, aĂ„Â§na ma nifhmux wisq minn dak li qiegĂ„Â§ed tgĂ„Â§id, u tabilĂ„Â§aqq qegĂ„Â§din: narawk dgĂ„Â§ajjef fostna. Li ma kienx minĂ„Â§abba (li nirrispettaw Ă„Â§afna). lill-familja tiegĂ„Â§ek, konna. diga Ă„Â§aggariek, (Barra minn hekk) m'intix gĂ„Â§aziz gĂ„Â§alina (u lanqas ma gĂ„Â§andek ebda setgĂ„Â§a fuqna).' f

92.translation: Qal (XugĂ„Â§ajb): 'Ja niesi, jaqaw il-familja tiegĂ„Â§i hija egĂ„Â§zez gĂ„Â§alikom: minn. Alla 7 Intom: xĂ„Â§ettuh. wara daharkom (ic cĂ„Â§adtuh u nsejtuh gĂ„Â§al: kollox). Sidi tabilĂ„Â§aqq jaf sewwa b'dak li tagĂ„Â§mlu

93.translation: Ja niesi, (ibqgĂ„Â§u) agĂ„Â§mlu kif tafu (fl-injuranza kbira tagĂ„Â§kom): jiena nagĂ„Â§mel (dak (i jitlob minni l-Islam), u se tkunu tafu min jigih kastig li jagĂ„Â§millu gĂ„Â§ajb, u min huwa giddiebl Mela stennew (Ă„Â§alli taraw x'se jigri ninnkon)); jiena nistenna magĂ„Â§kom

94.translation: U meta gie l-amar tagĂ„Â§na (u kien wasal. il-kastig), Ă„Â§lisna lil XugĂ„Â§ajb u lil dawk li emmnu miegĂ„Â§u, bi Ă„Â§niena mingĂ„Â§andna. U lill-Ă„Â§ziena Ă„Â§adhom (gĂ„Â§a/ gĂ„Â§arrieda) il- Ă„Â§oss qawwi, u mas-sebĂ„Â§ kienu mixĂ„Â§utin (fl-art, mejtin) fi djarhom

95.translation: (bĂ„Â§allikieku fgatt): ma' gĂ„Â§exu fihom, Mela Ă„Â§alli jkun (gens) Madjan 'il bogĂ„Â§od (minn Alla, misĂ„Â§ur u meqrud), bĂ„Â§alma tbiegĂ„Â§ed (gens) Tamidl

96.translation: U bgĂ„Â§atna il-Mosc bis-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na u b'setgĂ„Â§a cara

97.translation: gĂ„Â§and il-FargĂ„Â§un u kbaratu, izda huma mxew fuq l-amar tal-FargĂ„Â§un, u l-amar tal-FargĂ„Â§un ma' fihx. gĂ„Â§aqal (i jwassal gĂ„Â§at-telfien)

98.translation: Huwa gĂ„Â§ad jimxi quddiem niesu f'Jum il-Qawmien U. jwassalhom san-Nar. Ta' gĂ„Â§ajb ikun l-imkien li jaslu fih

99.translation: F'din (id-dinja) u f'Jum il-Qawmien gĂ„Â§andhom. saĂ„Â§ta timxi warajhom. Ta' gĂ„Â§ajb l-gĂ„Â§otja li jingĂ„Â§ataw (l ma hijiex gĂ„Â§ajr is-saĂ„Â§ta)

100.translation: Dawn. huma xi ftit mill-grajjiet ta' l-ibliet li: AĂ„Â§na ngĂ„Â§idulek (MuĂ„Â§ammad) dwarhom: hemm (bliet) minnhom li gĂ„Â§adhom wieqfa (sal-lum, minkejja li nieshom inqerdu) u (oĂ„Â§rajn) inĂ„Â§asdu (minn wicc id-dinja, flimkien ma' nieshom, bil-kastig li laqathom, u gew fix-xejn)

101.translation: Mhux AĂ„Â§na li nqasna lejhom. izda kienu huma li naqsu lejhom infushom (bit-twemmin fieragĂ„Â§ tagĂ„Â§hom fl-allat), u l-allat tagĂ„Â§hom, li huma jsejĂ„Â§u minflok lil Alla, ma swewlhom xejn meta gie l-amar ta' Sidek (li huwa l-kastig, anzi) ma ziduhomx gĂ„Â§ajr fit-telfien (u l-qerda)

102.translation: Hekk hija l-qabda (gerrieda) ta' Sidek meta (fl-gĂ„Â§adab kbir tiegĂ„Â§u) jaqbad l-ibliet fil-Ă„Â§azen tagĂ„Â§hom (u jagĂ„Â§mel Ă„Â§aqq minnhom). Il-qabda tiegĂ„Â§u tabilhaqq ta' wgigĂ„Â§ u qalilal

103.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li f'dawn (il-grajjiet kollha li ssemmew) hemm sinjal (u tagĂ„Â§lima kbira) gĂ„Â§al min jibza' mill-kastig (fil- Ă„Â¦ajja) l-OĂ„Â§ra. Dak huwa Jum li n-nies jingemgĂ„Â§u gĂ„Â§alih (biex isir Ă„Â§aqq minnhom); dak huwa Jum li (kulĂ„Â§add gĂ„Â§ad) jixhed gĂ„Â§alih

104.translation: M'AĂ„Â§niex se nĂ„Â§alluh (dak il-Jum) gĂ„Â§al Ă„Â§in ieĂ„Â§or, jekk mhux gĂ„Â§al zmien magĂ„Â§dud

105.translation: Fil-Jum meta jasal, ebda ruĂ„Â§ ma titkellem gĂ„Â§ajr bir-rieda tiegĂ„Â§u. (Fost il-bnedmin migbura gĂ„Â§all-Gudizzju) ikun hemm minnhom li jkun imnikket, u minnhom li jkun ferĂ„Â§an

106.translation: U dawk li jkunu mnikktin ikunu fin-Nar: fih hemm it- tnehid (b'nifs qawwi), u l-ilfiq

107.translation: Fih jgĂ„Â§ammru gĂ„Â§al dejjem; sa ma jdumu s-smewwiet u l- art, Ă„Â§lief kemm irid Sidek. Sidek tabilĂ„Â§aqq jagĂ„Â§mel li jrid

108.translation: U dawk (wisq) ferĂ„Â§anin ikunu fil-Genna, u fiha jgĂ„Â§ammru gĂ„Â§al dejjem, sa ma jdumu s-smewwiet u l-art, Ă„Â§lief kemm irid Sidek; (din tkun) gĂ„Â§otja bla waqfien

109.translation: Mela la-tkunx bejn Ă„Â§altejn fuq dak (il-qerg) li dawn (in-nies pagani) iqimu. Huma ma jqimux gĂ„Â§ajr dak li missirijiethom qiemu qabel. AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq nagĂ„Â§tuhom il-Ă„Â§las sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§ tagĂ„Â§hom (/i huwa l-kastig), mhux imnaqqas

110.translation: AĂ„Â§na tassew tajna l-Ktieb lil Mosc, u ma kienx hemm qbil fuqu. Li kieku mhux gĂ„Â§al Kelma li laĂ„Â§qet (ingĂ„Â§atat) minn Sidek (li jĂ„Â§alli l-Ă„Â§las mistĂ„Â§oqq lil kulĂ„Â§add gĂ„Â§all- AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum), kieku diga sar Ă„Â§aqq minnhom. (fid-dinja sies). Huma (nies Qurajx) tassew jinsabu f'dubju (li jĂ„Â§allihom) bejn Ă„Â§alltejn (dwar il-Qoran)

111.translation: Sidek tabilĂ„Â§aqq se jagĂ„Â§tihom Ă„Â§las sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§, lil-kulĂ„Â§add (tajbin. u Ă„Â§ziena), ta' l-gĂ„Â§emejjel tagĂ„Â§hom. Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq jaf sew b'dak li jagĂ„Â§mlu

112.translation: Mela'zomm fit-triq it-tajba, kif kien l-amar li ngĂ„Â§atajt (MuĂ„Â§ammad, int) u min, miegĂ„Â§ek, idur bl-indiema (lejn Alla), u la taqbzux il-limiti (iffissati minn Alla)l Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq jara sew dak li tagĂ„Â§mlu

113.translation: La toqogĂ„Â§dux fuq dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu l-Ă„Â§azen, gĂ„Â§aliex (inkella) imisskom in-Nar, u ma gĂ„Â§andkomx Ă„Â§bieb (biex jaqbzu gĂ„Â§alikom u jĂ„Â§arsukom) gĂ„Â§ajr Alla, u lanqas ikollkom l-gĂ„Â§ajnuna

114.translation: U agĂ„Â§mel it-talb (MuĂ„Â§ammad) fiz-zewgt itruf tan-nhar (fis-sebĂ„Â§ u wara. nofsinhar) u' fil-bidu tal-lejl. L- gĂ„Â§emejjel tajba tabilĂ„Â§aqq ixejnu lill-Ă„Â§ziena. Din hija tifkira gĂ„Â§al dawk li jiftakru (dejjem f'Alla)

115.translation: U stabar (MuĂ„Â§ammad), gĂ„Â§aliex Alla tassew ma jtellifx il-Ă„Â§las ta' dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu t-tajjeb

116.translation: Mhux li kien hemm, fost. il-generazzjonijiet ta' qabilkom, min kien baqagĂ„Â§lu (xi fzir gĂ„Â§erf), li ma kienx iĂ„Â§alli (issir) Ă„Â§sara fuq l-art, Ă„Â§lief gĂ„Â§al ftit minnhom (li gĂ„Â§amlu hekk u) li konna Ă„Â§lisna. Izda dawk li gĂ„Â§amlu l- Ă„Â§azen imxew fil-Ă„Â§ajja komda (u ta' tgawdija) li ngĂ„Â§atatilhom, u kienu Ă„Â§atjin

117.translation: Sidek ma kienx jeqred il-bliet gĂ„Â§alxejn b'xejn, filwaqt li nieshom kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu l-gid

118.translation: Li kieku ried, Sidek kien jagĂ„Â§mel lin-nies kollha gens wieĂ„Â§ed (b'religjon waĂ„Â§da li hija l-Islam), izda huma gĂ„Â§adhom ma jaqblux bejniethom

119.translation: Ă„Â§lief dawk (minn nies is-sewwa) li Sidek Ă„Â§enn gĂ„Â§alihom. U gĂ„Â§al dan Ă„Â§alaqhom (biex ikun hemm minnhom li jitĂ„Â§allsu bil-Genna u oĂ„Â§rajn bl-Infern). U Kelmet Sidek tilĂ„Â§aq il-milja tagĂ„Â§ha: 'Nimla tabilĂ„Â§aqq l-Infern bil-gzn u n-nies, ilkoll flimkient

120.translation: AĂ„Â§na ngĂ„Â§idulek kollox dwar il-grajjiet tal-MibgĂ„Â§utin dak li bih inqawwulek qalbek. F'dawn (il-grajjiet) giek is-sewwa, twissija u tifkira lil dawk li jemmnu

121.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad) lil dawk li ma jemmnux: ''AgĂ„Â§mlu kif tafu (fl-injuranza kbira tagĂ„Â§kom): aĂ„Â§na nagĂ„Â§mlu (dak li jitlob minna l-Islam)

122.translation: U stennew (Ă„Â§alli taraw x'se jigri minna); aĂ„Â§na wkoll nistennew (biex naraw il-kastig ikrah li gej fuqkom)

123.translation: Ta' Alla huma l-Ă„Â§wejjeg mistura tas-smewwiet u l-art, u gĂ„Â§andu terga' lura l-kwistjoni kollha (gĂ„Â§all-Ă„Â§aqq tiegĂ„Â§u). Mela agĂ„Â§tih qima u Ă„Â§alli f'idejhl Sidek ma jaqbizlu xejn minn dak li tagĂ„Â§mlu

1.translation: Alif. Lam. Ra'. Dawn huma l-versi tal-Ktieb (li fih kollox huwa mfisser b'mod) mill-aktar car

2.translation: AĂ„Â§na nizzilnieh Qoran (bl-ilsien) GĂ„Â§arbi biex forsi tifhmu (li l-Awtur tiegĂ„Â§u ma huwa Ă„Â§add Ă„Â§lief Alla; Sid il- bnedmin)

3.translation: AĂ„Â§na ngĂ„Â§idulek (MuĂ„Â§ammad) l-aĂ„Â§jar grajjiet meta qegĂ„Â§din innebbĂ„Â§uk dan il-Qoran, u tabilĂ„Â§aqq li qabel kont minn dawk li ma kinux jafu (bih)

4.translation: Meta Guzeppi qal lil-missieru (Gakobb): 'Missier (f'Ă„Â§olma) jiena rajt Ă„Â§dax-il kewkba, u x-xemx u l-qamar rajthom mixĂ„Â§utin quddiemi (jagĂ„Â§tuni gieĂ„Â§)

5.translation: Qal (missieru): 'Ibni, la tgĂ„Â§idx lil-Ă„Â§utek b'dak li rajt, li ma jdaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§lukx f'xi nasba (u, fl-gĂ„Â§ira tagĂ„Â§hom gĂ„Â§alik, joqtluk). Ix-Xitan tabilĂ„Â§aqq huwa gĂ„Â§adu fil-beraĂ„Â§ tal- bniedem

6.translation: Hekk Sidek jaĂ„Â§trek, jgĂ„Â§allmek. it-tifsir tal-grajjiet, u jgib fil-milja tagĂ„Â§ha l-grazzja tiegĂ„Â§u fuqek u fuq nies Gakobb, bĂ„Â§alma. qabel kien gab il-milja tagĂ„Â§ha fuq missirijietek Abraham u Izakk. Sidek tabilĂ„Â§aqq jaf kollox u GĂ„Â§aref

7.translation: Tassew li f'Guzeppi u (fil-grajja tiegĂ„Â§u ma') Ă„Â§utu hemm sinjali gĂ„Â§al dawk li jfittxu (is-sewwa)

8.translation: Meta (l-aĂ„Â§wa ta' Guzeppi) qalu: ''Tassew li Guzeppi u J Ă„Â§uh (Benjamin) huma egĂ„Â§zez gĂ„Â§al missiera minna, gĂ„Â§alkemm aĂ„Â§na gemgĂ„Â§a qawwija (mhux bĂ„Â§al dawn iz- zewg dgĂ„Â§ajfin). Missierna tabilĂ„Â§aqq imĂ„Â§awwad sew (biex: qiegĂ„Â§ed jippreferi lil dawn)i

9.translation: Oqtlu lil Guzeppi, jew keccuh f'art (oĂ„Â§ra, imbiegĂ„Â§da), biex Ă„Â§sieb missierkom ikun fuqkom biss, u wara dan (kollu, tindmu minn Ă„Â§tijietkom u) tkunu nies gustil

10.translation: WieĂ„Â§ed minnhom (Guda, l-akbar fost l-aĂ„Â§wa) qal (lil Ă„Â§utu): 'La toqtlux lil-Guzeppi, izda ixĂ„Â§tuh f'qiegĂ„Â§ il- giebja, (hekk li) min ikun gĂ„Â§addej, jigbru jekk (daĂ„Â§Ă„Â§altuha f'raskom li) tridu tagĂ„Â§mlu(lu xi Ă„Â§aga biex teĂ„Â§ilsu minnu)U

11.translation: Huma qalu: ''Missier, gĂ„Â§aliex ma tafdalniex lil Guzeppi, meta aĂ„Â§na rridulu l-gid

12.translation: GĂ„Â§ada ibagĂ„Â§tu magĂ„Â§na biex jgĂ„Â§addi z-zmien u jilgĂ„Â§ab, u (serraĂ„Â§ rasek gĂ„Â§aliex) aĂ„Â§na nieĂ„Â§du Ă„Â§siebul

13.translation: (Qalfi/hom missierhom): ' TabilĂ„Â§aqq nitnikket li kellkom tmorru. bih, u nibza' li jieklu xi lupu meta intom ma tkunux moĂ„Â§Ă„Â§kom fih (minĂ„Â§abba l-logĂ„Â§ob tagĂ„Â§kom)

14.translation: Huma qalu: 'Li kieku l-lupu kellu jieklu, meta aĂ„Â§na gemgĂ„Â§a qawwija, mela (inkunu) tellifin (aĂ„Â§na wkoll) f

15.translation: U meta marru bih, qablu Ikoll li jqegĂ„Â§duh f'qiegĂ„Â§ il- giebja. U AĂ„Â§na nebbaĂ„Â§nieh (b'dan li gej): 'TabilĂ„Â§aqq li (jasal il-jum meta). tĂ„Â§abbrilhom dan l-gĂ„Â§emil (ikrah) tagĂ„Â§hom, meta huma ma jintebĂ„Â§ux (min int)

16.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad filgĂ„Â§axija gew jibku gĂ„Â§and missierhom

17.translation: Qalu: 'Missierna, aĂ„Â§na morna ntellqu, u Ă„Â§allejna. lil Guzeppi ma' Ă„Â§wejjigna, u kielu l-lupu. M'intix se temminna, gĂ„Â§alkemm qegĂ„Â§din ngĂ„Â§idu s-sewwa

18.translation: U gabu l-qmis tiegĂ„Â§u (imcappsa) b'demm. falz. Qalilhom): 'Le, (ma huwiex kif qegĂ„Â§din tgĂ„Â§idu), izda intom infuskom tĂ„Â§ajjartu tagĂ„Â§mlu xi Ă„Â§aga. Is-sabar (f'dan il-Ă„Â§in ta' niket) huwa xieraq, u mingĂ„Â§and Alla (biss nitlob) l-gĂ„Â§ajnuna (dwar) dan li qegĂ„Â§din tgĂ„Â§idu

19.translation: U giet karovana u bagĂ„Â§tu (/ejn il-giebja) lil-min itella' l-ilma. Dendel il-barmil tiegĂ„Â§u (x mera ra lil Guzeppi mqabbad mal-Ă„Â§abel, stagĂ„Â§geb Ă„Â§afna u) qal: 'Xi bxara tajba dinl Dan tfajjelt' U Ă„Â§bewh mal-merkanzija, u Alla kien jaf kollox b'dak li kienu qegĂ„Â§din jagĂ„Â§mlu

20.translation: Huma bigĂ„Â§uh bi prezz irĂ„Â§is, xi ftit bicciet tal-fidda, u qisuh li ma jiswiex wisq

21.translation: U l-Egizzjan li xtrah qal lil martu: 'Giblu gieĂ„Â§ (lif dan Guzeppi). waqt li qiegĂ„Â§ed hawn (magĂ„Â§na; min jaf) jista' jkun ta' fejda gĂ„Â§alina, jew inrabbuh qisu kien l-iben tagĂ„Â§na (gĂ„Â§aliex bqajna bla tfal): 7 Hekk. saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§aĂ„Â§na lil Guzeppi fl-art (ta' l-Egittu), u biex ngĂ„Â§allmu it-tifsir tal- grajjiet (fil-Ă„Â§olm). Alla gĂ„Â§andu Ă„Â§akma fuq kollox, izda Ă„Â§afna min-nies ma jafux (dan)

22.translation: Meta (Guzeppi) kien fl-aĂ„Â§jar tiegĂ„Â§u (ta' tletin sena), tajnieh id-dehen u l-gĂ„Â§erf. Hekk inĂ„Â§allsu lil dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu t-tajjeb

23.translation: Izda dik li (Guzeppi) kien qiegĂ„Â§ed f'darha (il-mara ta' sidu l-Egizzjan) ippruvat twaqqgĂ„Â§u (fid-dnub). Hija gĂ„Â§alqet il-bibien u qalet: SEjjaf' Qal(i/ha Guzeppi): 'Alla Ă„Â§aresl Sidi (fi huwa zewgek) laqagĂ„Â§ni tajjeb gĂ„Â§andu fu m'iniex se nĂ„Â§allsu b'Ă„Â§aga kerha bĂ„Â§al din)l Il-Ă„Â§ziena ma joĂ„Â§orgux rebbiĂ„Â§in

24.translation: Hija xtaqitu (b'qalbha kollha), u huwa (ta' bniedem li kien) kieku kien jixtieqha, li mhux gĂ„Â§aliex ra l-prova cara ta' Sidu (li Ă„Â§elsiru minn dak it-tigrib kbir). Hekk (gĂ„Â§amilna biex) inwarrbu minn fuqu l-Ă„Â§azen u x-xewqat taĂ„Â§xija. Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq fost il-qaddejja leali (ur safjin) tagĂ„Â§na

25.translation: Huma t-tnejn grew lejn il-bieb, (huwa biex jaĂ„Â§rab minnha, u hija biex izzommu gewwa), u qattgĂ„Â§etlu l-qmis minn wara, (u f'dak il-Ă„Â§in) Sabu (ma' wicchom) lil sidha fil-bieb. Hija qalet: 'X'gĂ„Â§andu jkun il-Ă„Â§las ta' dak li ried id-deni lil martek, jekk mhux li jintefa' f'Ă„Â§abs, jew (jieĂ„Â§u) kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§

26.translation: Qal (Guzeppi): 'Hija ppruvat twaqqagĂ„Â§nil' WieĂ„Â§ed minn niesha xehed u qal: 'Jekk il-qmis tiegĂ„Â§u tqattgĂ„Â§et minn quddiem, mela hija qiegĂ„Â§da tgĂ„Â§id is-sewwa, u huwa mill-giddibin

27.translation: Izda jekk il-qmis tiegĂ„Â§u tqattgĂ„Â§et minn wara, mela hija gidbet, u huwa minn dawk li jgĂ„Â§idu s-sewwa

28.translation: U meta (sid Guzeppi) ra l-qmis tiegĂ„Â§u mqattgĂ„Â§a minn wara, qal: ''Dan tabilĂ„Â§aqq (gej) mill-qerq tagĂ„Â§kom in- nisa. Tassew kbir il-qerq tagĂ„Â§koml

29.translation: Guzeppi, insa dan (li gara, u' titkellem ma' Ă„Â§add dwaru)l U inti (mara) itlob maĂ„Â§fra gĂ„Â§al dnubek. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li inti fost il-Ă„Â§atjin

30.translation: Xi nisa fil-belt qalu: ''Il-mara tal-kbir ippruvat twaqqa' lill-qaddej tagĂ„Â§ha. Hija xegĂ„Â§let bl-imĂ„Â§abba gĂ„Â§alih. AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq qegĂ„Â§din narawha f'telfien mill-aktar car

31.translation: U meta semgĂ„Â§et it-tnassis tagĂ„Â§hom, hija bagĂ„Â§tet gĂ„Â§alihom, Ă„Â§ejjitilhom fejn jintasbu (gĂ„Â§all-ikla), u tat lil kull waĂ„Â§da minnhom sikkina, u qalet (fil Guzeppi): OĂ„Â§rog quddiemhomi' Meta rawh, faĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ruh (minĂ„Â§abba l- gmiel tiegĂ„Â§u, u fid-dehxa li Ă„Â§akmithom) qatgĂ„Â§u idejhom, u qalu: ''Alla Ă„Â§arisnal Dan ma huwiex bniedem Dan ma huwiex gĂ„Â§ajr anglu mill-aqwaf

32.translation: Hija qalet: 'Dak huwa li intom kontu tlumuni dwaru; ippruvajt inwaqqgĂ„Â§u, kontra r-rieda tiegĂ„Â§u, izda zamm iebes. U jekk (issa) ma jagĂ„Â§milx dak li ngĂ„Â§idlu, zgur li jintefa' fil-Ă„Â§abs u jkun (jitqies) mal-baxxif

33.translation: Huwa (talab u) qal: ''Sidi, il-Ă„Â§abs huwa egĂ„Â§zez gĂ„Â§alija minn dak li qegĂ„Â§din isejĂ„Â§uli gĂ„Â§alih, u jekk ma twarrabx minni l-qerq tagĂ„Â§hom, gĂ„Â§andi mnejn inmil lejhom (bix- xewqa tal-gisem, ta' bniedem. tad-demm u l-laĂ„Â§am li: jien), u nkun fost l-injuranti

34.translation: U Sidu (il-Mulej Alla) semgĂ„Â§u (fit-talb: tiegĂ„Â§u), u warrab minnu l-qerq tagĂ„Â§hom. Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq li jisma' kollox u jaf kollox

35.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad wara li (l-Egizzjani) raw is-sinjali (li Guzeppi kien bla Ă„Â§tija) dehrilhom li (ikun aĂ„Â§jar jekk) jitfgĂ„Â§uh fil- Ă„Â§abs gĂ„Â§al xi zmien

36.translation: U miegĂ„Â§u fil-Ă„Â§abs daĂ„Â§lu zewg zgĂ„Â§azagĂ„Â§, u wieĂ„Â§ed minnhom qal: 'Jiena rajt lili nnifsi (f'Ă„Â§olma) nagĂ„Â§sar l- inbid;' u l-ieĂ„Â§or qal: ''Jiena rajt lili nnifsi (f'Ă„Â§olma) ingorr xi Ă„Â§obz fuq rasi, u t-tjur jieklu minnu. Ă„Â¦abbrilna t-tifsira ta' dan, gĂ„Â§aliex aĂ„Â§na tassew qegĂ„Â§din naraw li inti minn dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu t-tajjeb

37.translation: Huwa qal(ilhom): ''Ma jigikomx ikel li jingĂ„Â§atalkom (ta' kuljum) li ma' nĂ„Â§abbrilkomx. x'inhu. qabel ma jigikom. Dan huwa minn dak (l-gĂ„Â§erf) li gĂ„Â§allimni Sidi. Jiena Ă„Â§allejt it-twemmin (falz) ta' nies li ma jemmnux f'Alla u li jicĂ„Â§du (il-Ă„Â¦ajja) l-OĂ„Â§ra

38.translation: Jiena nimxi fuq it-twemmin ta' missirijieti Abraham, Izakk u Gakobb (li Ikoll kienu Profeti ta' Alla). AĂ„Â§na (il- MibgĂ„Â§utin tiegĂ„Â§u) ma jixirqilna (qatt) inxierku xejn (u lil Ă„Â§add) ma' Alla. Dak minĂ„Â§abba t-tjieba ta' Alla fuqna (li gĂ„Â§azilna Profeti tiegĂ„Â§u) u fuq in-nies (l-oĂ„Â§ra), izda Ă„Â§afna. min-nies ma jizzux Ă„Â§ajr

39.translation: Ja sĂ„Â§abi. t-tnejn tal-Ă„Â§abs, (nixtiegkom 1gĂ„Â§iduli jekk) humiex. aĂ„Â§jar. Ă„Â§afna. (allat u) sidien maqsumin bejniethom, jew Alla, il-WieĂ„Â§ed, li jista' gĂ„Â§al kollox

40.translation: Intom ma tqimux, minfloku, Ă„Â§lief ismijiet (fiergĂ„Â§a) li intom u missirijietkom semmejtu, u li Alla ma kien nizzel ebda setgĂ„Â§a gĂ„Â§alihom. Il-Gudizzju huwa ta' Alla biss. Huwa amar li ma tqimux gĂ„Â§ajr lilu. Dan huwa d-din tas- sewwa, izda Ă„Â§afna min-nies ma jafux

41.translation: JassĂ„Â§abi t-tnejn tal-Ă„Â§abs, wieĂ„Â§ed minnkom it-tnejn (se joĂ„Â§rog qawwi u sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§ mill-Ă„Â§abs u) se (jerga jibda) jisqi l- inbid lil Sidu, izda l-ieĂ„Â§or se jissallab, u t-tjur se jieklu minn rasu. (Hekk) inqatgĂ„Â§et il-kwistjoni li qegĂ„Â§din tistaqsu dwarha

42.translation: U (Guzeppi) qal lil dak minnhom it-tnejn li kien jaf li kien Ă„Â§ieles (mill-mewr): 'Semmini ma' sidek (is-sultan, meta toĂ„Â§rog mill-Ă„Â§abs, forsi jiena wkoll noĂ„Â§rog minn hawn gew).' Izda x-Xitan nessieh li kellu jsemmih ma' sidu, u (Guzeppi) baqa' fil-Ă„Â§abs gĂ„Â§al xi snin (oĂ„Â§ra)

43.translation: Is-sultan (ta' l-Egittu) qal: 'Jiena rajt (f'Ă„Â§olma) seba' baqriet smien jikluhom seba' (baqriet) magĂ„Â§luba, u seba' sbuliet Ă„Â§odor u (sebgĂ„Â§a) oĂ„Â§ra niexfa, Ja kbarat (tiegĂ„Â§i), fissruli dan li rajt fil-Ă„Â§olma tiegĂ„Â§i, jekk tassew tafu tfissru l-Ă„Â§olm

44.translation: (Qaluflu): ''TaĂ„Â§wida sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§a ta' Ă„Â§olm ( 17 ma jfisser xejnji AĂ„Â§na ma nafux kif infissru l-Ă„Â§olm)

45.translation: Dak (iz-zagĂ„Â§zugĂ„Â§) miz-zewg (Ă„Â§bieb ta' Guzeppi) li kien Ă„Â§eles (mill-Ă„Â§abs), u li wara xi zmien kien ftakar (f'dak li talbu Guzeppi), qal(ilhom): 'Jiena nĂ„Â§abbrilkom it-tifsira ta' dan (i s-sultan ra fil-Ă„Â§olm). IbagĂ„Â§tuni (fil-Ă„Â§abs gĂ„Â§and Guzeppiji)

46.translation: (Fil-Ă„Â§abs, huwa qal:) 'Guzeppi, ja bniedem tas-sewwa, fissrilna. (din. il-Ă„Â§olma dwar) seba' baqriet smien. li jikluhom seba' baqriet magĂ„Â§lubin, u seba' sbuliet Ă„Â§odor u (sebgĂ„Â§a) oĂ„Â§ra niexfa. B'hekk inkun nista' mmur lura gĂ„Â§and in-nies (tiegĂ„Â§i), biex forsi jsiru jafu

47.translation: Qal (Guzeppi): ''GĂ„Â§al seba' snin tizirgĂ„Â§u bla waqfien, u dak li taĂ„Â§sdu Ă„Â§alluh fis-sbul tiegĂ„Â§u (biex ma jsewwisx), gĂ„Â§ajr gĂ„Â§al ftit minnu biex tieklu (issa mine)

48.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad wara dan jigu seba' snin ibsin (ta' nixfa kbira), li jieklu dak kollu li kontu rfajtu gĂ„Â§alihom, gĂ„Â§ajr gĂ„Â§al ftit li zzommu maĂ„Â§zun (biex terggĂ„Â§u rizirgĂ„Â§uh)

49.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad tigi, wara dan, sena li matulha n-nies ikollhom l-ilma (korra), u matulha (ukoll) jagĂ„Â§sru fiz- zejt u l-gĂ„Â§eneb

50.translation: Qal is-sultan: ''Gibuhuli (lil Guzeppi)f' Izda meta l- mibgĂ„Â§ut (tas-sultan) gie gĂ„Â§andu, (Guzeppi) qal(lu): Erga' lura gĂ„Â§and sidek u staqsih x'gara min-nisa li kienu qatgĂ„Â§u idejhom. Sidi tabilĂ„Â§aqq jaf tajjeb bil-qerq tagĂ„Â§hom

51.translation: Qal (is-sultan lil-dawk in-nisa): 'X'kienet din tagĂ„Â§kom, meta ppruvajtu twaqqgĂ„Â§u lil-Guzeppif' Qalu: ''Alla Ă„Â§arisnal AĂ„Â§na ma rajna ebda deni minnul' Il-mara tal- kbir qalet: 'Issa deher is-sewwa Kont jiena li ppruvajt inwaqqgĂ„Â§u, u huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq minn dawk li jgĂ„Â§idu u jagĂ„Â§mlu s-sewwat

52.translation: (ImbagĂ„Â§ad Guzeppi qal: ''QiegĂ„Â§ed ngĂ„Â§id) dan biex (sidi) ikun jaf li jiena ma ttradejtux bil-moĂ„Â§bi, u li Alla ma jgibx 'il-quddiem il-qerq tat-tradituri

53.translation: Jiena ma neĂ„Â§lisx lili nnifsi mill-Ă„Â§tija. Ir-ruĂ„Â§. tassew tamar (lill-bniedem) Ă„Â§afna l-Ă„Â§azen, Ă„Â§lief dik ir-ruĂ„Â§ li jĂ„Â§enn (gĂ„Â§aliha) Sidi (il-Mulej). Sidi tabilĂ„Â§aqq Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

54.translation: U qal is-sultan: 'Gibuhulil Inzommu gĂ„Â§alija nnifsil' U meta (Guzeppi) kellmu, qal(lu s-sultan): Inti Hum tabilĂ„Â§aqq tinsab gĂ„Â§andna, fis-sod ui fdat

55.translation: Qal (Guzeppi): 'QegĂ„Â§edni fuq l-imĂ„Â§azen ta' l-art (kollha ta' l-Egittu). Jiena naf inĂ„Â§arishom

56.translation: Hekk saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§aĂ„Â§na lil Guzeppi fl-art (ta' l-Egittu bis- setgĂ„Â§a u bil-gieĂ„Â§), biex jgĂ„Â§ix kull fejn irid fiha. AĂ„Â§na nagĂ„Â§tu l-Ă„Â§niena tagĂ„Â§na lil min irridu, u m'AĂ„Â§niex se ntellfu l-Ă„Â§las ta' dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu t-tajjeb

57.translation: Tassew li l-Ă„Â§las ta' l-OĂ„Â§ra (tal-Ă„Â¦ajja l-OĂ„Â§ra) huwa l- aĂ„Â§jar gĂ„Â§al dawk li jemmnu u jibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla

58.translation: U gew Ă„Â§ut Guzeppi, daĂ„Â§lu quddiemu u hu gĂ„Â§arafhom. izda huma ma gĂ„Â§arfuhx

59.translation: U meta tahom dak li kienu jeĂ„Â§tiegu, qal(i/hom): ''Gibuli lil (Benjamin) Ă„Â§ukom minn missierkom (izda minn omm oĂ„Â§ra)l Mela ma tarawx li jiena nagĂ„Â§ti kejl tajjeb, u li jiena l-aĂ„Â§jar fost dawk li jilqgĂ„Â§u n-nies gĂ„Â§andhom

60.translation: Jekk ma ggibuhulix, (mil-lum 'il quddiem) ma jkollkom mingĂ„Â§andi ebda kejl (ta ' qamĂ„Â§), u lanqas toqorbu lejjal

61.translation: Qalu (l-aĂ„Â§wa): ''Se naraw kif nikkonvincu lil missieru (b'xi mod jew ieĂ„Â§or) dwaru, Dan tabilĂ„Â§aqq nagĂ„Â§mluhi

62.translation: U (Guzeppi) qal lill-qaddejja tiegĂ„Â§u: ''QiegĂ„Â§du l- merkanzija tagĂ„Â§hom (li gabu magĂ„Â§hom biex jibdluha ma' l-ikel) fil-Ă„Â§orgiet tagĂ„Â§homt GĂ„Â§andhom imnejn jagĂ„Â§rfuha meta jmorru lura gĂ„Â§and nieshom, biex forsi jerggĂ„Â§u lura (hawn fl-Egittu)

63.translation: U meta reggĂ„Â§u lura gĂ„Â§and missierhom, (qabel ma ferĂ„Â§u l-Ă„Â§orgier) qalu: ''Missierna, (jekk m'aĂ„Â§niex se nieĂ„Â§du magĂ„Â§na lil Ă„Â§una Benjamin fl-Egittu), se niccaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§du mill- kejl (tal-qamĂ„Â§ u se nibqgĂ„Â§u b'xejn). GĂ„Â§alhekk ibgĂ„Â§at magĂ„Â§na lil Ă„Â§una (Berjamin) biex nieĂ„Â§du l-kejl tagĂ„Â§na, (u serraĂ„Â§ rasek) gĂ„Â§aliex aĂ„Â§na tassew nieĂ„Â§du Ă„Â§siebu

64.translation: Qal (missierhom: Gakobb): ''Nafdakom bih bĂ„Â§alma qabel kont fdajtkom b'Ă„Â§uh (Guzeppi) 7 Izda Alla huwa l- AĂ„Â§jar li jieĂ„Â§u Ă„Â§sieb (il-bnedmin), u Huwa l-Aktar Ă„Â¦anin fost dawk li jĂ„Â§ennu

65.translation: U meta fetĂ„Â§u s-soror tagĂ„Â§hom sabu li l-merkanzija tagĂ„Â§hom (li kienu Ă„Â§adu magĂ„Â§hom) intraddet lilhom, u qalu: ''Missierna, xi rridu (aktar minn hekk) 2: Din il- merkanzija tagĂ„Â§na ntraddet lilna (mingĂ„Â§ajr ma nafu kif. u issa nistgĂ„Â§u) niksbu ikel (ieĂ„Â§or) gĂ„Â§al niesna, nieĂ„Â§du Ă„Â§sieb Ă„Â§una, u nizdiedu (fil-qmuĂ„Â§ u fl-ikel) daqs tagĂ„Â§bija ta' gemel. Dan huwa (/assew) kejl Ă„Â§afif (biex ingibuh)

66.translation: (Gakobb) qal: ''Ma nibagĂ„Â§tux (lil Benjamin) magĂ„Â§kom qabel ma taĂ„Â§ilfuli quddiem Alla li ggibuhuli lura, gĂ„Â§ajr jekk. (intom stess) tkunu mdawra (mill-gĂ„Â§edewwa u tingĂ„Â§elbu).' U meta Ă„Â§alfulu, qal: ''Alla jixhed gĂ„Â§al dan li ngĂ„Â§idul

67.translation: U qal (missierhom Gakobb): 'Ja wliedi, la tidĂ„Â§lux minn bieb wieĂ„Â§ed, izda idĂ„Â§lu minn bosta bibien (biex ma tolqotkomx gĂ„Â§ajn Ă„Â§azina). Jiena ma niswielkom xejn quddiem Alla. Il-Ă„Â§aqq huwa biss ta' Alla, u jiena Ă„Â§allejt f'idejh. U Ă„Â§a jĂ„Â§allu f'idejh dawk (kollha) li jafdaw (f'xi Ă„Â§addji)

68.translation: U meta daĂ„Â§lu minn fejn kien amrilhom missierhom, (dan) ma kien swielhom xejn quddiem Alla, u (il-kliem li kien qalilhom missierhom kien) biss Ă„Â§tiega ta': Gakobb innifsu (li xtaq li ma jigri xejn lil uliedu, u issa dik il- Ă„Â§tiega) kien qdieha. Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq kellu l-gĂ„Â§arfien minĂ„Â§abba dak li gĂ„Â§allimnieh (bit-tnebbiĂ„Â§ tagĂ„Â§na), izda Ă„Â§afna min-nies ma jafux

69.translation: U meta daĂ„Â§lu quddiem Guzeppi, laqa' gĂ„Â§andu lil-Ă„Â§uh (Benjamin). u qal(lu mingĂ„Â§ajr ma semgĂ„Â§uh l-aĂ„Â§wa l- oĂ„Â§ra): 'Jiena tabilĂ„Â§aqq Ă„Â§uk, u la titnikkitx b'dak li (Ă„Â§utna) kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu(Ina)

70.translation: U meta tahom dak li kienu jeĂ„Â§tiegu, huwa qiegĂ„Â§ed it- tazza fil-Ă„Â§orga ta' Ă„Â§uh (Benjamin). U dak li (xogĂ„Â§lu kien li) isejjaĂ„Â§, gĂ„Â§ajjat (dan il-kliem): ''Intom tal-karovana, intom tassew Ă„Â§allelini

71.translation: Qalu (l-aĂ„Â§wa), filwaqt li daru lejhom: Xi tliftu

72.translation: Qalu (il-qaddejja Egizzjani): ''Tlifna t-tazza tas-sultan. U (Guzeppi qal): 'Min igibha (lura), jingĂ„Â§ata b'tagĂ„Â§bija ta' gemel. (fi qmuĂ„Â§ u ikel), u Jiena marbut b'dan (li qiegĂ„Â§ed inwiegĂ„Â§ed)

73.translation: Qalu (l-aĂ„Â§wa): 'Fuq Alla' Intom tafu li ma gejniex biex nagĂ„Â§mlu Ă„Â§sara fl-art, u li m'aĂ„Â§niex Ă„Â§allelin

74.translation: (L-Egizzjani) qalu: ''Xi jkun il-Ă„Â§las ta' dak (l-gĂ„Â§emil), jekk (jinsab li) intom giddibin

75.translation: Qalu (l-aĂ„Â§wa): 'Il-Ă„Â§las ta' dak li (it-tazza) tinsab fil- Ă„Â§orga tiegĂ„Â§u (ikun li) huwa (stess jinzamm maqbud) bĂ„Â§ala kumpens. Hekk inĂ„Â§allsu lill-Ă„Â§ziena (skond il-ligi tagĂ„Â§na)

76.translation: GĂ„Â§alhekk (Guzeppi) beda (ifittex) fis-soror tagĂ„Â§hom qabel (ina fittex) fis-sorra ta' Ă„Â§uh (Benjamin), imbagĂ„Â§ad Ă„Â§arigha mis-sorra ta' Ă„Â§uh. Hekk fassalna l-pjan tagĂ„Â§na gĂ„Â§al Guzeppi (biex izomm lil Ă„Â§uh miegĂ„Â§u). Huwa ma kienx jista' jaqbad lil Ă„Â§uh bil-ligi tas-sultan, Ă„Â§lief jekk Alla ried (li dan iseĂ„Â§Ă„Â§), AĂ„Â§na ngĂ„Â§ollu fi gradi (ta' gĂ„Â§erf u gieĂ„Â§). lil-min irridu, u fuq kull bniedem ta' gĂ„Â§arfien hemm Dak li jaf kollox

77.translation: Qalu: 'Jekk seraq, (din ma hijiex xi Ă„Â§aga stramba gĂ„Â§aliex) wieĂ„Â§ed minn Ă„Â§utu kien seraq qabel. (ir mingĂ„Â§alihom li kien Guzeppi).' Izda Guzeppi zamm (dan kollu) mistur fih innifsu u ma wrihulhomx: Huwa qal (bejnu u bejn ruĂ„Â§u, filwaqt li fiakar. f'dak li Ă„Â§utu kienu gĂ„Â§amlulu fl-imgĂ„Â§oddi): ''Intom. tinsabu f'qagĂ„Â§da agĂ„Â§ar (minn hekk), u Alla jaf l-aktar b'dak li qegĂ„Â§din tgĂ„Â§idu (iu tĂ„Â§arrfu)

78.translation: Qalu: 'Ja Ă„Â§akem, (kun af li) missieru xiĂ„Â§ Ă„Â§afna. Mela Ă„Â§u wieĂ„Â§ed minna minflokul AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq naraw li inti minn dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu t-tajjeb

79.translation: Qal (Guzeppi): 'Alla Ă„Â§ares nieĂ„Â§du (Ă˘â€šÂ¬ nzommu maqbud) Ă„Â§lief lil dak li gĂ„Â§andu sibna Ă„Â§wejjigna (it-tazza tas- sultan, gĂ„Â§aliex) inkella nkunu tabilĂ„Â§aqq ingusti

80.translation: Meta qatgĂ„Â§u jieshom minnu, warrbu (minn Ă„Â§dejn Guzeppi) biex jitĂ„Â§addtu bejniethom (dwar x'kellu jsir), u l-kbir fosthom (Guda) qal: ''Mela ma tafux li missierkom Ă„Â§a l-kelma tagĂ„Â§kom quddiem Alla u kif, qabel (ma seĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ dan, kontu diga) inqastu(h) minĂ„Â§abba (dak li gĂ„Â§amiltu lil) Guzeppi. GĂ„Â§alhekk m'iniex se nĂ„Â§alli (din) l-art qabel ma' missieri jĂ„Â§allini (nagĂ„Â§mel dan), jew (inkella) Alla jaqtagĂ„Â§ha gĂ„Â§alija (x'se jsir minni). Huwa l-AĂ„Â§jar fost l- imĂ„Â§allfinl

81.translation: (ErggĂ„Â§u lura gĂ„Â§and missierkom u gĂ„Â§iduf/u): 'Missierna, tassew li ibnek seraq, u ma nixhdux gĂ„Â§ajr gĂ„Â§al dak li sirna nafu. U (meta tajniek kelmitna) lanqas ma stajna nkunu nafu l-mistur (u rza konniex nafu li Benjamin se jisraq)

82.translation: Staqsi fil-belt li konna fiha, u l-karovana li gejna magĂ„Â§ha, (u tara) li aĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq qegĂ„Â§din ngĂ„Â§idu s- sewwa

83.translation: Qal (Gakobb): ''Le, (mhux kif qegĂ„Â§din tgĂ„Â§idu), izda intom infuskom tĂ„Â§ajjartu tagĂ„Â§mlu Ă„Â§aga (Ă„Â§azina bĂ„Â§al din). Is-sabar xieraq (gĂ„Â§alija f'dan il-Ă„Â§in ta' niket). GĂ„Â§andu mnejn Alla jgibhomli Ikoll (lil uliedi Guzeppi, Benjamin u Guda). Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq jaf kollox u GĂ„Â§aref

84.translation: U telaqhom (mgĂ„Â§addab u mnikket gĂ„Â§all-aĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar) u qal: SX'gĂ„Â§ali gĂ„Â§andi gĂ„Â§al Guzeppil' U gĂ„Â§ajnejh bjadu bin- niket (ww bil-biki bla waqfien, hekk li ma baqax jara) u gĂ„Â§amel wisq f'qalbu

85.translation: Qalu: 'Fuq Allal Mela m'inti se tieqaf (qafr) tiftakar f'Guzeppi, sa ma tinfena bil-mard, jew tkun mill- meqrudin

86.translation: Qal (Gakobb): ''QiegĂ„Â§ed biss nuri d-diqa u n-niket tiegĂ„Â§i lil Alla, u jiena naf minn Alla dak li ma tafux

87.translation: Uliedi, morru u fittxu lil-Guzeppi u lil Ă„Â§uh, u taqtgĂ„Â§ux jieskom mit-tjieba u mill-Ă„Â§niena ta' Alla, TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Ă„Â§add ma jaqta' jiesu mit-tjieba u mill-Ă„Â§niena ta' Alla gĂ„Â§ajr dawk li ma jemmnux

88.translation: U meta (l-aĂ„Â§wa waslu gĂ„Â§and: Guzeppi u) daĂ„Â§lu quddiemu, qalu: 'Ja Ă„Â§akem, il-Ă„Â§sara messet lilna u lil niesna (minĂ„Â§abba l-guĂ„Â§ u n-nixfa f'artna, hekk li issa) ftit li xejn gibna merkanzija (gĂ„Â§at-tpartit)j. GĂ„Â§alhekk (kun Ă„Â§anin magĂ„Â§na u) agĂ„Â§tina kejl sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§, u agĂ„Â§mel karita magĂ„Â§na, TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla jĂ„Â§allas lil dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu karita

89.translation: Qal: 'Tafu x'gĂ„Â§amiltu lil Guzeppi (f'zgĂ„Â§ozirkomi, u lil Ă„Â§uh (Benjamin), fl-injuranza tagĂ„Â§kom

90.translation: Qalu: ''Jaqaw inti Guzeppi 7' Qal: 'Jiena Guzeppi u dan. Ă„Â§ija (Benjamin). Alla Ă„Â§aseb fina (u Ă„Â§elisna minn kull saram). Tassew li min jibza' minn Alla u jistabar, Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq ma jtellifx il-Ă„Â§las ta' dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu t-tajjeb

91.translation: Qalu: 'Fuq Allat Tassew li Alla gĂ„Â§azlek u ppreferiek minna, u aĂ„Â§na konna tassew il-Ă„Â§atjini

92.translation: Qal (Guzeppi): ''(Ă„Â¦alli ma jkun hemm) ebda Ă„Â§tija fuqkom illumt Alla jaĂ„Â§frilkom, u Huwa l-Aktar Ă„Â¦anin fost dawk li jĂ„Â§ennu

93.translation: Morru b'din il-qmis tiegĂ„Â§i, ixĂ„Â§tuha fuq wicc missieri, u jerga' jibda jara' ImbagĂ„Â§ad ejjew gĂ„Â§andi b'nieskom, ilkollt

94.translation: U meta l-karovana telqet (mill-Egittu lejn l-art ta' KangĂ„Â§an), missierhom qal: 'Jiena tabilĂ„Â§aqq qiegĂ„Â§ed naqbad ir-riĂ„Â§a ta' Guzeppi, gĂ„Â§alkemm intom tqisuni xiĂ„Â§ zmagat

95.translation: Qalu (niesu): 'Fuq Alla, inti tassew gĂ„Â§adek fit-taĂ„Â§wid ta' qabel: (minĂ„Â§abba. l-fissazzjoni tiegĂ„Â§ek dwar Guzeppi)U

96.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad meta gie dak li jagĂ„Â§ti l-bxara t-tajba, xeĂ„Â§etha (il-qmis) fuq wiccu u (Gakobb) rega' beda jara. Qalilhom (missierhom): ''Ma gĂ„Â§edtilkomx. li jiena naf minn Alla dak li ma tafux

97.translation: Qalu: ''Missierna, itlob' biex. dnubietna. jinĂ„Â§afru, (gĂ„Â§aliex) aĂ„Â§na konna tassew Ă„Â§atjin

98.translation: (Qalilhom): 'Se nitlob lil Sidi (il-Mulej). jaĂ„Â§frilkom. Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

99.translation: U meta (Gakobb, uliedu, u nieshom) daĂ„Â§lu quddiem Guzeppi, huwa laqa' gĂ„Â§andu lill-genituri tiegĂ„Â§u, u qal: SIdhlu (ilkoll) fl-Egittu mĂ„Â§arsin, jekk Alla jridi

100.translation: U (Guzeppi) gĂ„Â§olla lill-genituri tiegĂ„Â§u fuq it-tron (tal- gieĂ„Â§), u. Ikoll inxteĂ„Â§tu fl-art quddiemu. Huwa qal: ''Missier, din hija t-tifsira tal-Ă„Â§olma tiegĂ„Â§i (Zi kont Ă„Â§lomt). qabel (u li kont gĂ„Â§arrafthielek), u Sidi (il-Mulej) tabilĂ„Â§aqq gabha fis-seĂ„Â§Ă„Â§. Huwa kien tajjeb miegĂ„Â§i meta Ă„Â§arigni mill-Ă„Â§abs, u (/ilkom) gabkom mid-dezert, wara li x-Xitan kien gab firda bejni u bejn Ă„Â§uti. Sidi tabilĂ„Â§aqq jaĂ„Â§dem bil-Ă„Â§lewwa u b'mod mistur. biex jilĂ„Â§aq dak li jrid. Huwa li jaf kollox, l-GĂ„Â§aref

101.translation: Sidi (il-Midej), Inti tajtni s-setgĂ„Â§a u gĂ„Â§allimtni tifsir il- grajjiet (kif jidhru fil-Ă„Â§olm). Ă„Â¦allieq is-smewwiet u l-art, Inti tieĂ„Â§u Ă„Â§siebi f'(din) id-dinja u fl-OĂ„Â§ra. Ă„Â¦udli ruĂ„Â§i meta jiena Mislem, u laqqagĂ„Â§ni mal-gusti

102.translation: Dawk huma xi ftit mill-grajjiet mistura (dwar Guzeppi) li AĂ„Â§na nnebbĂ„Â§ulek ( MuĂ„Â§ammad, u ngĂ„Â§allmuk). Inti ma kontx. magĂ„Â§hom: (Ă„Â§ut Guzeppi) meta qatgĂ„Â§uha x'gĂ„Â§andhom jagĂ„Â§mlu, huma u jĂ„Â§ejju n-nasba tagĂ„Â§hom

103.translation: Izda Ă„Â§afna min-nies ma jemmnux, minkejja. l-Ă„Â§egga tiegĂ„Â§ek (MuĂ„Â§ammad)

104.translation: Inti ma titlobx minnhom Ă„Â§las gĂ„Â§al dan (it-tĂ„Â§abrik tiegĂ„Â§ek. fosthom). Dan (il-Qoran) ma huwiex. gĂ„Â§ajr tifkira (u twissija) lill-Ă„Â§olqien

105.translation: U kemm-il sinjal fis-smewwiet u fl-art (li juru li hemm Alla WieĂ„Â§ed) jiltaqgĂ„Â§u magĂ„Â§hom, izda huma ma jagĂ„Â§tux kas (tagĂ„Â§hom)

106.translation: il-kotra tagĂ„Â§hom ma jemmnux f'Alla, Ă„Â§lief meta jxierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra miegĂ„Â§u)

107.translation: Jaqaw serrĂ„Â§u rashom li ma huwiex se-jigi fuqhom il- kastig ta' Alla li jgĂ„Â§attihom (vzinni kullimkien), jew li ma hijiex se tigi s-SiegĂ„Â§a gĂ„Â§al gĂ„Â§arrieda, mingĂ„Â§ajr ma jintebĂ„Â§u

108.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Din triqti (u ma fiha ebda tagĂ„Â§wig). Jiena nsejjaĂ„Â§ (biex idduru) lejn Alla. Jiena u min jimxi warajja gĂ„Â§andna gĂ„Â§arfien sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§. SebĂ„Â§ lil Allat M'iniex minn dawk li jxierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra ma' Allajf)

109.translation: Qablek. (MuĂ„Â§ammad). ma. bgĂ„Â§atniex gĂ„Â§ajr irgiel li nebbaĂ„Â§niehom, minn nies l-ibliet, (u la bgĂ„Â§atna nisa u lanqas angli jew ginn). Jaqaw (dawk li caĂ„Â§du t-twemmin) ma terrqux fuq l-art, u ma rawx kif kien tmiem dawk (il- Ă„Â§ziena) ta' qabilhom (biex forsi jieĂ„Â§du tagĂ„Â§lima) 7 Izda l- AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Dar hija l-aĂ„Â§jar gĂ„Â§al dawk li jibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla. Mela ma gĂ„Â§andkomx gĂ„Â§aqal (biex tifhmu)

110.translation: Meta l-MibgĂ„Â§utin qatgĂ„Â§u qalbhom (minn nieshom), u dehrilhom li kienu mgiddbin, giethom l-gĂ„Â§ajnuna (u r- rebĂ„Â§a) tagĂ„Â§na, u nĂ„Â§eles kulmin ridna. Il-qilla tagĂ„Â§na ma titwarrabx minn fuq in-nies il-Ă„Â§atjin

111.translation: Fi grajjiethom (ta' Guzeppi u Ă„Â§uni) hemm tagĂ„Â§lima gĂ„Â§an-nies ta' dehen. (Dan il-Qoran) ma huwiex xi Ă„Â§rafa li xi Ă„Â§add qala' minn zniedu, izda jseddaq dak li gĂ„Â§adda qablu (fil-Kotba mqaddsa); tifsira bir-reqqa ta' kollox, u tmexxija tajba u Ă„Â§niena gĂ„Â§al nies li jemmnu

1.translation: Alif. Lam. Mim. Ra'. Dawn huma l-versi tal-Ktieb. U dak li tnizzillek (MuĂ„Â§ammad) minn Sidek (il-Mulej) huwa s-sewwa, izda Ă„Â§afna min-nies ma jemmnux (fi)

2.translation: Alla huwa li refa' s-smewwiet mingĂ„Â§ajr kolonni li (tistgĂ„Â§u) tarawhom, imbagĂ„Â§ad intasab fuq it-Tron, u Ă„Â§addem ix-xemx u l-qamar (b'rizg il-bnedmin), ilkoll kemm huma jigru (fid-dawra tagĂ„Â§hom) lejn zmien imsemmi. Huwa jieĂ„Â§u Ă„Â§sieb kollox, u jfisser bir-reqqa s- sinjali biex forsi temmnu sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§ fil-laqgĂ„Â§a ma' Sidkom (il- Mulej)

3.translation: Huwa li medd l-art (bil-wesgĂ„Â§at tagĂ„Â§ha mĂ„Â§ejjija gĂ„Â§all- bnedmin u gĂ„Â§all-bhejjem), gĂ„Â§amel fiha igbla mqiegĂ„Â§da fis-sod u xmajjar, u l-frott kollu gĂ„Â§amlu f'zewg (gĂ„Â§amliet: ragel u mara), u jifrex il-lejl (bĂ„Â§al velu) fuq in-nhar. F'dan (kollu) tabilĂ„Â§aqq hemm sinjali gĂ„Â§al nies li jixtarru (is-siwi tagĂ„Â§hom)

4.translation: Fl-art hemm qatgĂ„Â§at Ă„Â§dejn xulxin, gonna ta' l-gĂ„Â§eneb, gĂ„Â§elieqi mizrugĂ„Â§a u sigar tal-palm b'gĂ„Â§erq wieĂ„Â§ed (bejniethom) u (oĂ„Â§rajn) b'gĂ„Â§eruq differenti; (dan kollu) jissaqqa b'ilma wieĂ„Â§ed, filwaqt li nippreferu uĂ„Â§ud (minn dan il-frott) minn ieĂ„Â§or gĂ„Â§all-ikel. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li f'dan (kollu) hemm sinjali gĂ„Â§al nies bil-gĂ„Â§aqal

5.translation: Jekk qiegĂ„Â§ed tistagĂ„Â§geb (bin-nuqqas ta' twemminhom), ta' l-gĂ„Â§ageb huwa kliemhom (in-nies bla twemmin meta jgĂ„Â§idu): ''Jaqaw, meta nkunu trab, tassew se nkunu f'Ă„Â§olqien gdidf' Dawk huma li ma jemmnux f'Sidhom (il-Mulej). Dawk huma li (f'Jum il-Ă„Â¦aqq). gĂ„Â§enuqhom jixxekklu. Dawk huma nies in-Nar, u fih jgĂ„Â§ammru gĂ„Â§al dejjem

6.translation: Huma (mingĂ„Â§alihom jiddieĂ„Â§ku bik, MuĂ„Â§ammad, u) jitolbuk tgĂ„Â§aggel (iggib fuqhom) l-gĂ„Â§emil Ă„Â§azin. (il- kastig) qabel. it-tajjeb, u (dan meta) qabilhom seĂ„Â§Ă„Â§u (bosta) xbihat (ta' kastigi li messu nies Ă„Â§ziena bĂ„Â§alhom). Sidek (il-Mulej) tabilĂ„Â§aqq Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra man-nies minkejja l-Ă„Â§azen tagĂ„Â§hom, u tassew li Sidek Qalil fil- kastig (ma' min jibqa' ma jindimx, sa l-aĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar)

7.translation: U dawk (fost il-pagani ta' Qurajx) li ma jemmnux, jgĂ„Â§idu: ''GĂ„Â§aliex (lil MuĂ„Â§ammad) ma. jinzillux. sinjal minn Sidu (Zi juri li huwa tassew Profeta ta' Alla) 7' Izda (inti, MuĂ„Â§ammad) tm'intix gĂ„Â§ajr wieĂ„Â§ed li jwiddeb, u kull gens gĂ„Â§andu min imexxih

8.translation: Alla jaf dak li ggorr (f'gufha) kull mara (jekk huwiex tifel jew tifla), u kemm gĂ„Â§andhom nieqes il-gwief fimeta t-tarbija titwieled kmieni), u kemm gĂ„Â§andhom zejjed (hekk li gĂ„Â§addielhom iz-zmien). Kollox bil-qjies gĂ„Â§andu

9.translation: Huwa jaf il-mistur u dak li jidher. (Huwa) il-Kbir, l- GĂ„Â§oli Wisq

10.translation: Huma ndaqs (gĂ„Â§al Alla) min, fostkom, jostor il-kliem (f'qalbu) u min jurih fid-dieher (bi kliemu): min jinĂ„Â§eba billejl u jterraq Ă„Â§ieles binhar

11.translation: GĂ„Â§al (kull bniedem) hemm gĂ„Â§add ta' angli, quddiemu u warajh, li jĂ„Â§arsuh, bl-amar ta' Alla. Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq ma jibdilx dak li jinsab f'xi gens qabel ma (dawn in-nies) jibdlu dak li hemm fihom infushom. U meta Alla jrid xi deni lil xi gens, ma hemm xejn li jista' jzommu, U ma gĂ„Â§andhomx Ă„Â§liefu min iĂ„Â§arishom

12.translation: Huwa li jurikom il-beraq, (gĂ„Â§ajn) ta' biza' (minĂ„Â§abba l- Ă„Â§sara li jista' jgib miegĂ„Â§u), u. ta' tama (gĂ„Â§aliex warajh tigi x-xita), u jtella' s-sĂ„Â§ab it-tqil (mimli xita)

13.translation: Ir-ragĂ„Â§ad ifaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar is-sebĂ„Â§ tiegĂ„Â§u, u (bĂ„Â§alu jagĂ„Â§mlu) l- angli, bil-biza' tiegĂ„Â§u. Huwa jibgĂ„Â§at is-sajjetti u jolqot bihom lil-min irid, u huma (il-pagani ta' Mekka, jissugraw) iĂ„Â§aqquha dwar Alla, meta Huwa Qalil fil- qawwa tiegĂ„Â§u

14.translation: Is-sejĂ„Â§a tabilĂ„Â§aqq issir lilu (biss), u dawk (l-idoli u l- allat) li (il-pagani) isejĂ„Â§u minfloku, ma jwegbuhom xejn; bĂ„Â§al dak li jifrex il-pali ta' idejh gĂ„Â§all-ilma biex jasal f'fommu, izda ma jilĂ„Â§qux. Is-sejĂ„Â§a ta' dawk bla twemmin ma tisfax gĂ„Â§ajr fix-xejn

15.translation: Quddiem Alla jinxteĂ„Â§et kulma hu fis-smewwiet u fl-art, irid jew ma jridx, (bĂ„Â§alma jagĂ„Â§mlu) id-dellijiet tagĂ„Â§hom filgĂ„Â§odu u filgĂ„Â§axija

16.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Min hu Sid is-smewwiet u l-art'' GĂ„Â§id: 'Allal' GĂ„Â§id: 'Jaqaw, minfloku, Ă„Â§adtu gĂ„Â§all- Ă„Â§arsien tagĂ„Â§kom lil-dawk li ma gĂ„Â§andhomx is-setgĂ„Â§a jkunu ta' fejda u deni gĂ„Â§alihom infushom'' GĂ„Â§id (ukoll): Jaqaw l-agĂ„Â§ma u min jara huma ndaqs, jew huma ndaqs id-dlamijiet u d-dawl 7 Jew gĂ„Â§amlu, ma' Alla, ixirka li Ă„Â§alqu bĂ„Â§alma Ă„Â§alaq Huwa, hekk li gĂ„Â§alihom il-Ă„Â§olqien (ta' dawn l-ixirka) jixbah. (il-Ă„Â§olqien ta' Alla) 7' GĂ„Â§id (mela): 'Alla huwa l-Ă„Â¦allieq ta' kollox, u Huwa l- WieĂ„Â§ed, li jegĂ„Â§leb lil kollox u lil kulĂ„Â§add

17.translation: Huwa jnizzel ilma mis-sema, u gelglu widien (ta' xita) skond id-daqs tagĂ„Â§hom, u l-ilmijiet igorru. magĂ„Â§hom ragĂ„Â§wa kotrana li titla' fil-wicc. RagĂ„Â§wa bĂ„Â§alha (toĂ„Â§rog) minn dak li jqabbdu fuq in-nar biex jagĂ„Â§mlu (oggezti ta') zina jew oggetti (tal-metall) gĂ„Â§all-uzu (tagĂ„Â§hom). Hekk Alla juri (bit-tixbihat) is-sewwa u l-batal. Ir-ragĂ„Â§wa malajr tigi fix-xejn, izda dak li hu ta' fejda gĂ„Â§an-nies jibqa' (fit-tul) fuq l-art. Hekk Alla juri bit-tixbihat

18.translation: Lil dawk li jwiegbu lil-Sidhom. (bit-twemmin u l- Ă„Â§arsien tad-digrieti tiegĂ„Â§u) hemm (imĂ„Â§ejjija) l-aĂ„Â§jar Ă„Â§aga (li hija l-Genna). Izda dawk li ma wegbuhx, li kieku kellhom kulma jinsab fuq l-art, u daqshekk ieĂ„Â§or (mizjud) miegĂ„Â§u, huma (kienu jippruvaw) jinfdew bih (izda kien ikun kollu gĂ„Â§alxejn). Dawk gĂ„Â§alihom hemm kont mill- agĂ„Â§ar, u l-kenn tagĂ„Â§hom huwa fl-Infern, u ta' gĂ„Â§ajb il- friex (tagĂ„Â§hom fin-Nar)

19.translation: Jaqaw (MuĂ„Â§ammad), dak li jaf li kulma tnizzillek minn Sidek (il-Qoran) huwa s-sewwa, huwa (l-istess) bĂ„Â§al min hu agĂ„Â§ma 7 Huma biss in-nies ta' dehen li jiftakru (u jixtarru dawn it-twissijiet)

20.translation: dawk li jzommu mar-rabta ta' Alla u ma jiksrux. il-patt (tagĂ„Â§hom)

21.translation: u dawk li jgĂ„Â§aqqdu dak li Alla amar li gĂ„Â§andu jkun magĂ„Â§qud (Ă„Â§aga waĂ„Â§da); jibzgĂ„Â§u minn Sidhom (il-Mulej), u jibzgĂ„Â§u mill-kont tal-biza' (li gĂ„Â§ad iridu jĂ„Â§allsu)

22.translation: u dawk li jistabru biex ifittxu Wicc Sidhom (il-Mulej), jagĂ„Â§mlu t-talb, u jonfqu (fil-karita), bil-moĂ„Â§bi jew fil-beraĂ„Â§, minn dak li tajniehom gĂ„Â§all-gĂ„Â§ajxien tagĂ„Â§hom, u jilqgĂ„Â§u (l- gĂ„Â§emil) il-Ă„Â§azin bit-tajjeb. Dawk. gĂ„Â§andhom tmiem (mill- isbaĂ„Â§) fid-Dar (ta' dejjem)

23.translation: il-Gonna ta' l-GĂ„Â§eden li huma jidĂ„Â§lu fihom flimkien mal- gusti minn fost missirijiethom, in-nisa tagĂ„Â§hom, u nisilhom, u l-angli jidĂ„Â§lu Ă„Â§dejhom minn kull bieb (biex jagĂ„Â§tuhom merĂ„Â§ba, filwaqt li jsellmulhom)

24.translation: Sliem gĂ„Â§alikom gĂ„Â§aliex stabartu (ur zammejtu sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§ fit- tigrib tad-dinja). Tassew sabiĂ„Â§ (dan) it-tmiem tad-Dar (ta' dejjem)i

25.translation: Izda dawk li jiksru r-rabta ta' Alla wara (li kienu laqgĂ„Â§u) il-patt. tiegĂ„Â§u, jaqtgĂ„Â§u dak li Alla amar li gĂ„Â§andu jkun magĂ„Â§qud (Ă„Â§aga waĂ„Â§da), u. jagĂ„Â§mlu l-Ă„Â§sara fuq l-art; dawk gĂ„Â§andhom is-saĂ„Â§ta, u tagĂ„Â§hom hija l-agĂ„Â§ar Darl

26.translation: Alla jifrex il-gid (tiegĂ„Â§u bix-xaba ') fuq min irid, u jagĂ„Â§tih bil-qjies (u bir-reqqa kollha, skond il-Ă„Â§tiega). Huma jifirhu bil-Ă„Â§ajja: (ta' din) id-dinja, izda l-Ă„Â§ajja fid-dinja: mqabbla mal-(Ă„Â¦ajja) l-OĂ„Â§ra, ma hijiex gĂ„Â§ajr tgawdija (fiergĂ„Â§a li ma ddumx ma tgĂ„Â§addi)

27.translation: U dawk li ma jemmnux (fost il-pagani ta' Mekka) jgĂ„Â§idu: ''GĂ„Â§aliex.ma jinzillux xi sinjal minn Sidu 7' GĂ„Â§idfilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): '' TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla jtellef it-triq lil-min irid, u juri t-triq (li twassal) lejh lil min idur niedem (lejh)

28.translation: dawk li jemmnu, u qlubhom isibu serĂ„Â§an fit-tifkira ta' Alla. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li fit-tifkira ta' Alla jsibu s-serĂ„Â§an tagĂ„Â§hom il- qlubl

29.translation: Dawkeli jemmnu u jagĂ„Â§mlu gĂ„Â§emejjel tajba, hena lilhom, u mill-aĂ„Â§jar il-migja lura (tagĂ„Â§hom fil-Genna)f

30.translation: Hekk bgĂ„Â§atniek (MuĂ„Â§ammad) gĂ„Â§and gens li qablu gĂ„Â§addew gnus (oĂ„Â§ra), biex taqralu dak. fil-Qoran). li nebbaĂ„Â§nielek, izda huma ma jemmnux f'Dak li Huwa Kollu Ă„Â¦niena. GĂ„Â§id(ilhom. MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Huwa Sidi. (il-Mulej), ma hemmx alla Ă„Â§lieful F'idejh Ă„Â§allejt u lejh indur

31.translation: Kieku kien hemm xi Qoran li (meta jinqara) bih jitĂ„Â§arrku l-igbla, jew bih tixxaqqaq l-art, inkella bih jintqal kliem lill- mejtin (ix dawn jibdew jitkellmu, kieku kien ikun dan il- Qoran)i Izda ta' Alla huwa l-amar, f'kolloxi Jaqaw dawk li jemmnu (gĂ„Â§adhom) ma qatgĂ„Â§ux jieshom (u gĂ„Â§adhom jaĂ„Â§sbit li l-pagani xi darba se jemmnu), u ma jafux li, kieku jrid, Alla kien imexxi fit-triq it-tajba lin-nies kollha 7 Izda dawk li caĂ„Â§du t-twemmin jibqgĂ„Â§u jintlaqtu minn gĂ„Â§awg kbir minĂ„Â§abba (il-Ă„Â§azen) li gĂ„Â§amlu, jew (l-gĂ„Â§awg) jasal (u jolqot) qrib darhom, sa ma tigi l-wegĂ„Â§da ta' Alla (u l-Islam joĂ„Â§rog rebbieĂ„Â§): TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla ma jiksirx il-wegĂ„Â§dal

32.translation: Tassew MibgĂ„Â§utin qablek (MiĂ„Â§armad) kienu mzebilĂ„Â§in, u tajt ftit taz-zmien lil-dawk li m'emmnux u mbagĂ„Â§ad Ă„Â§adthom (gĂ„Â§al gĂ„Â§arrieda bil-kastig. tiegĂ„Â§i) u x'kastig (ikrah) kient

33.translation: Jaqaw Dak li jinsab fuq kull ruĂ„Â§, ( 4 jaf sew) b'dak li kisbet (gĂ„Â§aliha nnifisha, huwa bĂ„Â§all-allat foloz)i Izda lil Alla gĂ„Â§amlulu ixirka (oĂ„Â§ra miegĂ„Â§u, u gĂ„Â§alhekk) gĂ„Â§idfilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Semmuhomt Jaqaw. (lil: Alla). qegĂ„Â§din tĂ„Â§abbrulu dak, fuq l-art, li Huwa ma jafx bih, jew (inkella dan tagĂ„Â§kom ma huwiex gĂ„Â§ajr) gĂ„Â§amla ta' kliem (fieragĂ„Â§) 7' Izda lil dawk li ma jemmnux izzejjen it-tnassis tagĂ„Â§hom (u Ă„Â§asbuh xi Ă„Â§aga tajba), u nzammu lura mit-triq (ta' Alla). U dak li Alla jtelliflu t-triq, ma gĂ„Â§andux min immexxi(h)

34.translation: GĂ„Â§alihom hemm kastig fil-Ă„Â§ajja (ra' din) id-dinja. izda huwa eĂ„Â§rex il-kastig ta' (il-Ă„Â¦ajja) l-OĂ„Â§ra, u ma gĂ„Â§andhomx min iĂ„Â§arishom minn Alla

35.translation: It-tixbiha tal-Genna mwiegĂ„Â§da lil-dawk li jibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla (hija din): ix-xmajjar jigru taĂ„Â§tha, l-ikel tagĂ„Â§ha u d-dell tagĂ„Â§ha huma gĂ„Â§al dejjem. Dak huwa tmiem dawk li kellhom il-biza' ta' Alla, izda tmiem dawk li ma jemmnux huwa n- Narl

36.translation: U dawk li tajniehom il-Ktieb jifirĂ„Â§u b'li: tnizzillek (MuĂ„Â§ammad), izda wĂ„Â§ud mill-gemgĂ„Â§at (li ngĂ„Â§aqdu biex jeĂ„Â§duha kontrik) jicĂ„Â§du taqsimiet minnu, GĂ„Â§id(ilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Jiena ma'ngĂ„Â§atajtx gĂ„Â§ajr l-amar li nqim lil Alla, u ma nxierek (lil Ă„Â§add aktar) miegĂ„Â§u. Lilu nsejjaĂ„Â§, u gĂ„Â§andu nerga' lura

37.translation: Hekk ukoll (dan il-Qoran) nizzilnieh bĂ„Â§ala gĂ„Â§erf u Ă„Â§aqq bl-ilsien GĂ„Â§arbi. Li kieku (MuĂ„Â§ammad) kellek timxi wara x- xewqat tagĂ„Â§hom. wara l-gĂ„Â§arfien (kollu) li giek, ma kienx ikollok min jieĂ„Â§u Ă„Â§siebek u jĂ„Â§arsek minn Alla

38.translation: AĂ„Â§na tassew bgĂ„Â§atna MibgĂ„Â§utin qablek, u tajniehom nisa u nisel. U ebda MibgĂ„Â§ut ma (seta') igib xi sinjal jekk mhux bir-rieda ta' Alla. GĂ„Â§al kull zmien hemm Ktieb (imĂ„Â§ejji)

39.translation: Alla jĂ„Â§assar (mill-Ktieb) u jwettaq (fih) dak li jrid, u gĂ„Â§andu tinsab Omm il-Ktieb (il-verzjoni originali tal-Kotba mqaddsa u d-digrieti divini)

40.translation: Jekk nuruk xi Ă„Â§aga minn dak (il-kastig) li wegĂ„Â§edniehom jew (inkella) intemmulek Ă„Â§ajtek (biex tingabar magĂ„Â§na din ma hijiex xi Ă„Â§aga tiegĂ„Â§ek). Inti dmirek huwa li xxandar (it-tagĂ„Â§lim ta' l-Islam), u xogĂ„Â§olna huwa (li nagĂ„Â§mlu). il- kont (magĂ„Â§hom fl-AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum)

41.translation: Mela (dawkli caĂ„Â§du t-twemmin) ma rawx li AĂ„Â§na nigu fl- art. (bil-MibgĂ„Â§utin. tagĂ„Â§na, u. nagĂ„Â§tuha: lin-nies. ta' twemmin), filwaqt li-nnaqqsuha mit-truf tagĂ„Â§ha (lil dawk li caĂ„Â§du r-religjon safja) 7 Alla jagĂ„Â§mel Ă„Â§aqq. Ă„Â¦add (u xejn) ma jzomm il-Ă„Â§aqq tiegĂ„Â§ul Huwa malajr jagĂ„Â§mel il-kontijiet

42.translation: Dawk ta' qabilhom nassu, izda kull tnassis huwa ta' Alla; Huwa jaf b'dak li tikseb kull ruĂ„Â§ (gĂ„Â§aliha nnifisha). Dawk li ma jemmnux se jkunu jafu gĂ„Â§al min huwa t-tmiem (mill- isbaĂ„Â§) fid-Dar (ta' dejjem)

43.translation: Dawk li caĂ„Â§du t-twemmin jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Inti (MuĂ„Â§ammad) m'intix MibgĂ„Â§ut (ta' Alla)' GĂ„Â§id(ilhom): 'Alla huwa bizzejjed bĂ„Â§ala Xhud bejni u bejnkom u (ix-xhieda ta') min gĂ„Â§andu l-gĂ„Â§arfien tal-Ktieb

1.translation: Alif. Lam. Ra'. Ktieb li nizzilnielek (MuĂ„Â§ammad) biex (bih) toĂ„Â§rog lin-nies mid-dlamijiet gĂ„Â§ad-dawl, bir-rieda ta' Sidhom (il-Mulej), lejn triq il-FelĂ„Â§an, li jistĂ„Â§oqq kull tifĂ„Â§ir

2.translation: (triq) Alla li tiegĂ„Â§u huwa kulma jinsab fis-smewwiet u fl- art (u ma jeĂ„Â§tieg lil Ă„Â§add). Ă„Â¦azin gĂ„Â§al dawk li caĂ„Â§du t- twemmin, minĂ„Â§abba l-kastig il-qalil (li se jmisshom)

3.translation: dawk li jĂ„Â§obbu aktar il-Ă„Â§ajja f'(din) id-dinja milli l-OĂ„Â§ra, izommu (lil Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or) mit-triq ta' Alla (li hi l-Islam), u jixtiquha. mgĂ„Â§awga (bil-gideb u x-xewqat tagĂ„Â§hom). Dawk huma f'telfien. kbir (i jinsabu maqtugĂ„Â§in gĂ„Â§alihom)

4.translation: Ma bgĂ„Â§atna ebda MibgĂ„Â§ut jekk mhux bi Isien niesu, biex ifehemhom bic-car (id-digrieti ta' Alla). Alla jtellef it-triq lil-min irid, u juriha lil min irid. Huwa l-Qawwi, l- GĂ„Â§aref

5.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq bgĂ„Â§atna lil Mosc- bis-sinjali: tagĂ„Â§na (ic gĂ„Â§ednielu): 'OĂ„Â§rog lil-niesek mid-dlamijiet gĂ„Â§ad-dawl, u fakkarhom f'Jiem. Alla. F'dan tabilĂ„Â§aqq hemm sinjali gĂ„Â§al kulmin izomm b'sabru u jizzi Ă„Â§ajr

6.translation: U (ftakar) meta Mosc qal lil niesu: ''Ftakru fil-grazzja ta' Alla fuqkom meta Ă„Â§eliskom minn nies il-FargĂ„Â§un li kienu jgarrbukom bl-agĂ„Â§ar tbatija: ibiccru lil uliedkom (subien), filwaqt li jĂ„Â§allu lin-nisa tagĂ„Â§kom Ă„Â§ajjin. F'dan kien hemm tigrib kbir minn Sidkom (il-Mulej)

7.translation: U (ftakar) meta Sidkom Ă„Â§abbar (hekk): ''Jekk tizzu Ă„Â§ajr (ta' kulma gĂ„Â§amilt magĂ„Â§kom), tabilĂ„Â§aqq inzidkom (fil- barkiet), izda jekk ticĂ„Â§du (il-grazzji tiegĂ„Â§i u ma: tizzux Ă„Â§ajr), il-kastig tiegĂ„Â§i jkun tassew qalilf

8.translation: Mosc qal (lil niesu): ''Jekk intom, u kulmin jinsab fuq l- art, ma temmnux, (kunu afir li) Alla tabilhaqq GĂ„Â§ani (u ma jeĂ„Â§tigkomx). u jistĂ„Â§oqq kull tifĂ„Â§ir

9.translation: Jaqaw ma waslitilkomx l-aĂ„Â§bar ta' dawk ta' qabilkom, (jigifieri) nies Noc, (u t-tribujiet ta') GĂ„Â§ad u Tamid, u ta' dawk li gew warajhom, li Ă„Â§add ma jaf bihom gĂ„Â§ajr Alla 7 Il-MibgĂ„Â§utin tagĂ„Â§hom gewhom bis-sinjali c-cari, izda huma qiegĂ„Â§du idejhom fuq Ă„Â§alqhom u qalu: 'AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq. nicĂ„Â§du dak (li: qegĂ„Â§din: tgĂ„Â§idu) li intom MibgĂ„Â§utin bih (u nicĂ„Â§du lilkom ukoll), u aĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq ninsabu f'dubju (li jĂ„Â§allina) bejn Ă„Â§alltejn dwar dak. li qegĂ„Â§din issejĂ„Â§ulna gĂ„Â§alih

10.translation: Il-MibgĂ„Â§utin tagĂ„Â§hom qalu(/hom): 'Hemm xi dubju dwar Alla, Ă„Â¦allieq is-smewwiet u l-art 2 Huwa jsejĂ„Â§ilkom biex jaĂ„Â§frilkom dnubietkom, u jagĂ„Â§tikom aktar Ă„Â§in (biex temmnu, tindmu, u tgĂ„Â§ixu. Ă„Â§ajja. xierqa), sa. zmien imsemmi. Qalu: 'M'intomx gĂ„Â§ajr nies bĂ„Â§alna, u tridu zzommuna minn dak li missirijietna kienu jqimu, Mela gibulna xi prova cara (dwar il-missjoni tagĂ„Â§kom) U

11.translation: Il-MibgĂ„Â§utin- tagĂ„Â§hom qalu(/kom): 'AĂ„Â§na' tabilĂ„Â§aqq bnedmin bĂ„Â§alkom, izda Alla jaĂ„Â§seb f'min irid mill- qaddejja tiegĂ„Â§u, u ma gĂ„Â§andniex gĂ„Â§alfejn ingibulkom xi prova, jekk mhux bir-rieda ta' Alla. F'idejn Alla gĂ„Â§andhom iĂ„Â§allu dawk li jemmnu

12.translation: U gĂ„Â§alfejn ma nĂ„Â§allux f'idejn Alla wara li wriena triqatna' (li fihom gĂ„Â§andna. nimxu) AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq se nistabru (u nzommu sod) minkejja. li twegggĂ„Â§una, Ă„Â¦a jĂ„Â§allu f'idejn Alla dawk kollha) li jafdaw

13.translation: Dawklli caĂ„Â§du t-twemmin qalu lill-MibgĂ„Â§utin tagĂ„Â§hom: SAĂ„Â§na' tabilĂ„Â§aqq noĂ„Â§orgukom minn artna, jew (inkella) terggĂ„Â§u lura gĂ„Â§at-twemmin tagĂ„Â§nal'' Sidhom (il-Mulej) nebbaĂ„Â§hom (hekk lill-MibgĂ„Â§utin tiegĂ„Â§u): AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq neqirdu lill-Ă„Â§ziena

14.translation: u warajhom inĂ„Â§allukom tgĂ„Â§ammru fl-art. Dan gĂ„Â§al min jibza' mill-waqfa quddiemi (fl-AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum), u jibza' mit- theddida tiegĂ„Â§i.' h

15.translation: Huma talbu (/i/ Alla) jagĂ„Â§tihom ir-rebĂ„Â§a, u kull tirann ta' rasu iebsa baqa' b'xejn

16.translation: Warajh hemm l-Infern, u jingĂ„Â§ata jixrob misĂ„Â§un jinten

17.translation: Huwa jixorbu boqqa boqqa, izda bilkemm ikun jista' jibilgĂ„Â§u (gĂ„Â§aliex jagĂ„Â§li w Ă„Â§azin wisq). Il-mewt tigi fuqu minn kullimkien, izda huwa ma jmutx. Quddiemu hemm kastig (ieĂ„Â§or, aktar) iebes (minn ta' qablu)

18.translation: It-tixbiha ta' dawk li jicĂ„Â§du lil Sidhom (il-Mulej hija din): l-gĂ„Â§emejjel tagĂ„Â§hom huma bĂ„Â§al irmied li r-riĂ„Â§ nefaĂ„Â§ fuqu bil-qawwa, f'jum ta' maltemp (ir gew fix- xejn). Huma ma gĂ„Â§andhom setgĂ„Â§a fuq xejn minn dak li kisbu, Dak huwa t-telfien il-kbir

19.translation: Mela ma rajtx li Alla Ă„Â§alaq is-smewwiet u l-art bis- sewwa. Jekk irid, (jista') jeqridkom u jgib Ă„Â§olqien gdid. (li joqgĂ„Â§od gĂ„Â§ad-digrieti tiegĂ„Â§u)

20.translation: Dak, gĂ„Â§al Alla, ma huwiex xi Ă„Â§aga tqila

21.translation: Ilkoll gĂ„Â§ad jidhru quddiem Alla, u d-dgĂ„Â§ajfin jgĂ„Â§idu lil dawk li tkabbru: ''AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq imxejna warajkom. (Issa). tistgĂ„Â§u teĂ„Â§ilsuna mill-kastig ta' Alla 7' Huma jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Kieku Alla mexxiena (fit-triq tiegĂ„Â§u), konna mmexxukom (fiha). U (issa) xorta waĂ„Â§da gĂ„Â§alina, sew jekk nitilfu sabarna, u sew jekk nistabru: ma gĂ„Â§andniex minn fejn naĂ„Â§arbu

22.translation: U meta l-kwistjoni tkun inqatgĂ„Â§et, ix-Xitan jgĂ„Â§id: Tassew li Alla wegĂ„Â§edkom il-wegĂ„Â§da tas-sewwa, u (jiena wkoll) wegĂ„Â§edtkom (u gĂ„Â§edtilkom li ma hemmx qawmien mill-imwiet, u ma hemmx kastig), izda ma zammejtx kelmti magĂ„Â§kom. Jiena ma kelli ebda setgĂ„Â§a fuqkom, Ă„Â§lief li: sejjaĂ„Â§tilkom (bit-tfesfis. tiegĂ„Â§i), u wegibtuni. Mela (issa (i: wasaltu hawn. fl-Infern) tlumunix, u lumu lilkom infuskom. Jiena ma nistax ngĂ„Â§inkom, u intom ma tistgĂ„Â§ux tgĂ„Â§inuni. Jiena nicĂ„Â§ad (gĂ„Â§emilkom li bih), qabel, gĂ„Â§amiltuni xrik ma' Alla. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li l-Ă„Â§ziena gĂ„Â§andhom kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§

23.translation: VU dawkli jemmnu u jagĂ„Â§mlu gĂ„Â§emejjel tajba jiddaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§lu f'Gonna bix-xmajjar jigru taĂ„Â§thom, u fihom jgĂ„Â§ammru gĂ„Â§al dejjem, bir-rieda ta' Sidhom (il-Mulej). U t-tislima tagĂ„Â§hom, fihom, tkun: ''Sliemf

25.translation: u tagĂ„Â§ti l-frott tagĂ„Â§ha f'kull Ă„Â§in, bir-rieda ta' Sidha. Alla jagĂ„Â§ti t-tixbihat lin-nies biex forsi jiftakru (u jixtarru t- tagĂ„Â§lim ta' Alla)

26.translation: U kelma Ă„Â§azina tixbah lil sigra Ă„Â§azina: hija titqaccat minn fuq l-art, u ma tistax tieqaf (waĂ„Â§idha)

27.translation: Alla jsaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§aĂ„Â§ lil dawk li jemmnu fil-Kelma soda fil- Ă„Â§ajja (f'din) id-dinja u fl-OĂ„Â§ra, u lill-Ă„Â§ziena joĂ„Â§roghom mit-triq it-tajba. Alla jagĂ„Â§mel li jridl

30.translation: Huma, lil Alla, gĂ„Â§amlu(/u) ixirka (li dehrilhom li huma) daqsu, biex itellfu t-triq (lil. Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or). GĂ„Â§id(ilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Thennew (gĂ„Â§al ftit taz-zmien: ieĂ„Â§orjl TabilĂ„Â§aqq li tmiemkom lejn in-Nart)

31.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad) lill-qaddejja tiegĂ„Â§i li emmnu, biex jagĂ„Â§mlu t-talb u jonfqu (fil-karita) mill-gid li tajniehom, bil-moĂ„Â§bi jew fil-beraĂ„Â§, qabel ma jasal Jum li fih la jkun hemm bejgĂ„Â§ (u xiri), u lanqas Ă„Â§biberija

32.translation: Huwa Alla li Ă„Â§alaq is-smewwiet u l-art, inizzel l-ilma mis-sema u joĂ„Â§rog bih minn (kull gĂ„Â§amla) ta' frott gĂ„Â§all- gĂ„Â§ajxien tagĂ„Â§kom, li qiegĂ„Â§ed l-imriekeb gĂ„Â§all-qadi tagĂ„Â§kom biex jigru fil-baĂ„Â§ar bir-rieda tiegĂ„Â§u, u qiegĂ„Â§ed ix-xmajjar gĂ„Â§all-qadi tagĂ„Â§kom

33.translation: Huwa qiegĂ„Â§ed gĂ„Â§all-qadi tagĂ„Â§kom ix-xemx u l-qamar, sĂ„Â§aĂ„Â§ fid-dawrien tagĂ„Â§hom, u qiegĂ„Â§ed gĂ„Â§all-qadi tagĂ„Â§kom il-lejl u n-nhar

34.translation: Huwa takom minn kulma: tlabtuh, u jekk (tippruvaw) tgĂ„Â§oddu l-grazzja (u l-barkiet) ta' Alla, (tintebĂ„Â§u li) ma tistgĂ„Â§ux tgĂ„Â§odduhom. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li l-bniedem huwa wisq ingust, wisq ingrat

35.translation: (Ftakar) meta Abraham qal: ''Sidi (il-Mulej), agĂ„Â§mel din il-belt (ta' Mekka) imkien ta' Ă„Â§arsien (u sliem), u warrab lili u lil uliedi mill-qima ta' l-idoli

36.translation: Sidi, huma tellfu t-triq lil Ă„Â§afna nies. GĂ„Â§alhekk min jimxi warajja, huwa minni (u miegĂ„Â§i), u min ma jobdinix, Inti (Mulej) tabilĂ„Â§aqq kollok maĂ„Â§fra, Ă„Â¦anin

37.translation: Sidna, jiena qegĂ„Â§edt lil-uĂ„Â§ud minn nisli (jigifieri lil ibni IsmagĂ„Â§el u lil marti Hagar) biex jgĂ„Â§ammru f'wied mhux mizrugĂ„Â§, qrib Darek l-imqaddsa (f'Mekka), Sidna. (il- Mulej), biex jagĂ„Â§mlu t-talb. Mela agĂ„Â§mel li l-qlub ta' wĂ„Â§ud mill-bnedmin imilu lejhom, u gĂ„Â§ajjixhom bil-frott biex forsi jizzu Ă„Â§ajr (ta' kulma gĂ„Â§amilt magĂ„Â§hom)

38.translation: Sidna (il-Mulej), Inti taf dak li naĂ„Â§bu u dak li nuru. Ma hemm xejn moĂ„Â§bi minn Alla fl-art, u lanqas fis-sema

39.translation: It-tifĂ„Â§ir lil Alla li fix-xjuĂ„Â§ija tani lil-IsmagĂ„Â§el u lil Izakk. Sidi tabilĂ„Â§aqq jisma' (u jilqa ' it-talb)

40.translation: Sidi, agĂ„Â§mel minni bniedem li jagĂ„Â§mel it-talb, u minn nisli (ukoll agĂ„Â§mel li jkun hemm min jgĂ„Â§ozz it-talb bĂ„Â§ali). Sidna, ilqa' t-talba tiegĂ„Â§i

41.translation: Sidna (il-Mulej), aĂ„Â§fer lili, lill-genituri tiegĂ„Â§i, u lil dawk (kollha) li jemmnu, fil-Jum meta jsiru l-kontijiet

42.translation: La taĂ„Â§sibx li Alla ma jintebaĂ„Â§x b'dak li jagĂ„Â§mlu l- Ă„Â§ziena. Huwa qiegĂ„Â§ed biss iĂ„Â§allihom gĂ„Â§al Ă„Â§in ieĂ„Â§or, gĂ„Â§al Jum meta l-gĂ„Â§ajnejn gĂ„Â§ad jiccassaw (bil-biza)

43.translation: Huma jigru mwerwrin b'Ă„Â§arsithom cassa, bi. rjushom merfugĂ„Â§a 'l fuq, mingĂ„Â§ajr ma jteptpu (/angas darba) gĂ„Â§ajnejhom, u qlubhom vojta (minĂ„Â§abba l-biza' kbir li jaĂ„Â§kimhom)

44.translation: Wissi (MuĂ„Â§ammad) lin-nies dwar il-Jum li fih jigihom il-kastig. Dawk li gĂ„Â§amlu l-Ă„Â§azen gĂ„Â§ad jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Sidna, agĂ„Â§tina mqar ftit tal-Ă„Â§in ieĂ„Â§or. AĂ„Â§na nwiegbu s-sejĂ„Â§a tiegĂ„Â§ek, u nimxu wara (il-bxara li gew biha) il- MibgĂ„Â§utin.' (U Alla l-Imbierek iwegibhom): 'Mela qabel ma kontux Ă„Â§liftu li m'intomx se tinqerdu (minn wicc l- arti)

45.translation: Intom gĂ„Â§extu fi djar dawk li (fl-imgĂ„Â§oddi kienu) naqsu kontra tagĂ„Â§hom. infushom, u kontu tafu sewwa x'gĂ„Â§amilnielhom, u tajniekom it-tixbihat (dwarhom, biex fl-aĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar tifhmu)

48.translation: Fil-Jum meta l-art titbiddel f'art oĂ„Â§ra (gdida, li ma tafx b'Ă„Â§azen), u s-smewwiet (ukoll jigrilhom hekk), u f(l- bnedmin kollha) jidhru quddiem Alla l-WieĂ„Â§ed, li jegĂ„Â§leb lil kollox u lil kulĂ„Â§add

5.translation: Ebda gens ma (jista') jgĂ„Â§aggel (u jgib fuqu l-kastig qabel) zmienu, u (/anqas) ma jdewwem (il-kastig) gĂ„Â§al zmien aktar tard. (Alla biss jaf meta huwa t-tmiem)

7.translation: GĂ„Â§aliex ma ggibilniex l-angli (biex jixhdu gĂ„Â§alik) jekk qiegĂ„Â§ed tgĂ„Â§id is-sewwa

8.translation: AĂ„Â§na mannizzlux l-angli jekk mhux bis-sewwa (is bil-kastig gĂ„Â§al dawk li rridu neqirdu), u (nies bĂ„Â§al dawn) ma jingĂ„Â§atawx. (aktar) zmien
